items.title: S E L F T A P E S S T U D I O C I T Y:

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS  -
VOICE PROJECTIONS LESSONS

I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.title: SINGING LESSONS  -

items.text:
**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

topComments.text: How are we supposed to contact you to apply 😕
Have the other roles mentioned in her relationship category been filled?

**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.
items.title: **Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

CASTING CALL - VOLUNTEER
Hi all! We are casting for a short film, which is being created by a passionate crew of Capilano University alumni and students. 

This call is for the following 7 roles attached. 

It is volunteer and will be required for 1 day among the 4 dates listed below. If you already know that only a certain day will work among those, please let us know which. 

This film is art heavy, and some of the characters may be bearing quite a bit of make up.

If you are interested please email or DM me your headshots, mention which of the characters you are interested in (one or more), and if you have an acting reel, send that over aswell:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

P.S. If you are interested in the lead role, that call was posted in the group yesterday if you’d like to check it out.

Hi everyone! My name's Daniel, I'm 21 years old and based in the North East of England.
Hi everyone! My name's Daniel, I'm 21 years old and based in the North East of England.

I'm currently at the beginning of my acting journey and actively looking for opportunities in film, TV, commercials, student productions and supporting artist work.

I have a full UK driving licence, I'm happy to travel for the right projects, and I'm always keen to learn and gain experience on set.

Professional headshots are booked for August, but in the meantime I'm happy to send recent photos and my acting CV if anyone is casting.

If anyone has any upcoming projects or knows of any opportunities, I'd love to hear from you.

Thanks for reading!

Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL

TITLE: Waiting on the Sky

GENRE: Drama/Comedy

LOGLINE: Three friends wait for the imminent alien arrival. On a rooftop patio they learn more about each other and uncover what they are really waiting for. 

ROLES:

Keely - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the alien hunter

Janice - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the supportive friend

Gordie - A young man in his 20s/30s, the uninvested doubter

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Denver Community Media. We are Denver’s community media access program and set up productions for students to get hands-on experience.

WRITER/DIRECTOR: Austin Anderson

PRODUCTION TYPE: Student Short Film

CONCTACT: Austin.Anderson@denvergov.org

RUN TIME: ~10 minutes

COMPENSATION: Unpaid

UNION STATUS: Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION: Self Tape or in-person at Denver Community Media

SHOOT DATES: July 16th and 17th from 5pm - 9pm. Must be available for both dates. 

Cheers!

items.text:
Looking for FEATURED EXTRAS for a short film shooting this Sunday!

Title: "The Remaking of Angela"

Logline: On the brink of losing everything, a broke fledgling writer guided by her hero, dives into a short film contest with her best friends only to find their amatuer efforts derailed by a longtime rival, and maybe even the law. 

When: Sunday, July 12th

8:30 AM - 11:30 AM

Who: This film features a black woman protagonist, and we're especially looking for diverse people of all ages for this scene! A good opportunity for aspiring actors, those new to Denver, or anyone looking to meet new people and network with local indie filmmakers.

Wear: The film is set in the mid-late 1990s. Anything that could pass for that era is preferred.

Come drop by for a few hours in the morning and have fun with us on set!

If interested, please fill out this form, and we'll be in touch to confirm:

sharedPost.text:
🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

💡 Value Highlight: Learn directly from a DP/Director whose professional rate is $1,500/day 

this 4-session online workshop gives you real film-level expertise at a fraction of that cost!
Price on enquiry.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype
"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name
🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.
🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach).

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill
📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):
Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."
The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"
Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.
Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.
Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call
📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable
🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point
📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew
🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.
Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)
🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape
📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:
Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.
Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.
Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:
Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.
Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux
📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

Final Performance (Day 4):
Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?
This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:
mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com
Let’s create something unforgettable.

# **HLEDÁME HERCE/NEHERCE DO REKLAMNÍ RODINKY**
**AUDIOVIZUÁLNÍ PREZENTAČNÍ SPOT PRO REALITNÍHO MAKLÉŘE**

Jedná se o natáčení propagačního spotu pro realitního makléře. Natáčení bude probíhat celý den **17. 7. 2026 v Praze**. Role jsou **honorované**.

**Sháníme členy rodiny:**
* **Maminka (40-50 let)**
* **Tatínek (40-50 let)**
* **Dcera - roztomilá holčička (5-8 let)**
* **Syn - teenager (14-18 let)**
* **Babička - (60+)**
* **Pejsek **

*Rodina se schází v obývacím pokoji, kde maminka začíná pociťovat úzkost z nedostatku prostoru. Tatínek se synem sledují v televizi sportovní přenos, zatímco do malého obýváku přichází babička s vnučkou a pejskem. Místnost se rychle zaplní a během chvíle v ní zavládne typický rodinný chaos.*

Herecké výkony nejsou náročné, bez dialogu. Preferujeme herce, přijímáme i neherce.

Zapraszamy do Statystowania w projekcie dla TikTok
Poszukujemy Osób w wieku 18-45 
Stawka za udział 100zł netto  płatne po planie  
(Plan potrwa max trzy godziny) 

❗️PROSIMY O PILNE ZGŁOSZENIA DO NIEDZIELI ❗️

25 Lipca (Sobota) 
- Osoby do scen w Skatepart

26 Lipca (Niedziela) 
- Powiśle sceny nad Wisłą 

28 Lipca (Wtorek) 
godziny wstępnie 10-13  Mordor eleganckie osoby jako pracownicy, którzy przechodzą po czerwonym dywanie. 

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń osoby bez akcentu możliwe do powiedzenia jedno zdanie. 

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o PILNE zgłoszenia na e-mail: statysci@profesjatv.pl

items.text: Hello everyone! I wanted to ask any actors here: How did you get into acting exactly? Any advice or tips on how to land roles? Thank you!

topComments.text: Take acting classes, join theater group, etc

What I have done is watch a lot of videos on headshots, resume, and just acting, I recommend checking out Tristan Spohn on YT he played #2 in stranger things and he has amazing tips! Also joing these facebook groups and just trying different auditions help in getting you something to build off of

items.text:
Expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text: This Sunday be there

sharedPost.text:
🚨♋ MEMPHIS... CANCER SEASON IS HERE! ♋🚨

ONLY 3 DAYS AWAY! The Annual Cancer Bash is almost here, and we're about to throw the BIGGEST Cancer Zodiac Celebration in Memphis! 💙🎉

📅 Sunday, July 19
📍 SwagHouse
3592 Knight Arnold Rd., Memphis, TN

Calling ALL Cancers from Memphis and the surrounding areas—this is YOUR night! Come celebrate your season with great people, great vibes, and unforgettable entertainment. Even if you're not a Cancer, come show love and party with us!

💵 Just a $2 minimum donation to get in — we're keeping it affordable for everybody!

🔥 ALL NIGHT:
🍹 Drink Specials
🍽️ Food Specials
🥃 FREE SHOTS for ALL Cancers until the bottles run out!
🎶 Live Band
🎤 Poetry
😂 Comedy
🎭 Live Entertainment
💃🏽 Nonstop vibes all night!

Let's make this the biggest Cancer Bash Memphis has ever seen! Tag every Cancer you know, share this post, and invite your friends and family. Don't wait for someone to tell you about it—BE THERE!

Who's celebrating with us? Drop a ♋ in the comments and TAG your Cancer crew! 💙

#CancerSeason #CancerBash #MemphisEvents #MemphisTN #MemphisNightlife #901Events #901 #Choose901 #LiveBand #LiveMusic #Poetry #SpokenWord #Comedy #LiveEntertainment #FoodSpecials #DrinkSpecials #CancerGang #ZodiacParty #SupportLocal #SundayFunday #BlackOwnedEvents #ShareShareShare #Viral #ExplorePage

items.text:
Trying to Be Good Is Ruining Your Acting.
Recently, in our weekly Audition class, we did a “bad acting” class, and it was truly a hit. It was an experiment that actually worked.

So, by popular demand, I’ve decided to create a full four-hour masterclass just on this topic because, honestly, letting yourself be BAD is so freeing, you have no idea.

More details here: https://forms.gle/wY7C8CzNzu7dAPrq8

NOT BASED IN TORONTO? We have a live Zoom observer option just for you!🤩

P.S. Please note all prices are in Canadian Dollars!

items.summary: URGENT CASTING!!!
items.title: URGENT CASTING!!!

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

“Way Back Home” Short Film 

Logline: A Korean American mother walks the path of grief while navigating her cultural connection to her father’s roots. Her journey captures how the heavy, isolating weight of parental loss changes us forever. 

Production Title: Way Back Home

Compensation: PAID, Travel and hotel stipend 

Audition Information: Virtual/Selftape 

Shooting Schedule: 

    •    Zoom table read - TBD
    •    Shoot dates Sept 2-6 

Shooting Location: Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado 

Non-Union 

Email: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com

This supporting role is very important to the overall story. Without this character, the lead has no clear direction. With that said, finding an older Korean male can be difficult so no experience is required but there has to be a desire to want to learn and be open-minded! 

Character Breakdown: 

APPA / HARABEOJI (Supporting)
Korean / East Asian
Actor will portray Appa at different stages of his life (40s/50s, 60s-70s):
Taekwondo Master and Dojo owner. Immigrated to the U.S. in the 1970s. A man building a life in a new country. Controlled and guarded, yet with glimpses of warmth beneath the surface and quite charismatic in his joyfulness for life. His physicality and stillness should communicate strength, sacrifice, and quiet determination.
A commanding presence — disciplined, dignified, and physically strong despite walking with a cane. His exterior is firm and authoritative, shaped by hardship and sacrifice, yet he carries a profound gentleness with those he loves and has an infectious smile. His face reflects lived experience: resilience, pride, and unspoken pain.

Must speak basic English and willing to speak some Korean, Native Korean speakers preferred. 

3 Days on Set

Please send your resume to: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com. 

We will email you the audition instructions.

sharedPost.text:
NOW CASTING TEEN GIRLS IN LOS ANGELES!
16 to 19y
Do you love earrings and have an awesome ear stack? We're looking for a cool, outgoing teenage girl who already has at least two pierced holes in each ear and is open to adding another piercing to continue her stack.
💰 Pays $600 for the shoot
💰 PLUS an additional $2,500 if your images are selected for use in the social media and email campaign
📍 Los Angeles Area Only
📅 Shoots August 6–7
To submit, send us a quick video:
• Tell us a little about yourself
• Show us your earrings and ear stack
• Tell us why you love them and what they mean to you
We can't wait to see your style!

Email me at: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL | *GREEN ROOM*

**"Is holding onto someone worth losing yourself?"**

In 2005, two teenage best friends discover a mysterious hidden room inside their high school that reveals visions of their futures, forcing one of them to choose between loyalty and the life he truly wants.

We're currently casting for our upcoming Vancouver Film School short film, **Green Room**, and are looking for passionate performers to join the project! We welcome both experienced actors and those who are just starting out.

If you're interested, please send your **headshot, self-tape, resume (if available), and demo reel (if available)** to:

**📧 ****[greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com)**

Due to our production schedule, **we will be casting directly from self-tapes.** We will **not** be holding in-person callbacks or a second round of auditions, as we are working with a very quick turnaround.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
## Production Information

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Shoot Dates:** July 30, July 31 & August 1, 2026
**Production:** Vancouver Film School
**Genre:** Coming-of-Age / Supernatural Drama
**Union Status:** Strictly Non - Union performers
**Compensation:** Volunteer / Non-paid. IMDb credit, demo reel footage, meals/craft services, and a **$10/day lunch stipend** will be provided.
## Roles
**ORRIN** *(Lead)*

**Male | Asian | Playing Age 18 - 25**

Orrin is charismatic, funny, impulsive, and impossible to ignore. He uses humor and reckless behavior to hide how deeply insecure he feels about himself and his future. Unlike Malik, Orrin has already convinced himself that he will never escape his hometown or become anything more than what he grew up around. He masks his fear with jokes, but underneath that energy is someone terrified of being abandoned and left behind by the one person who truly understands him—Malik. Orrin depends heavily on their friendship, even if he would never openly admit it. He is energetic, emotionally reactive, and constantly searching for distraction so he doesn't have to confront his own hopelessness. Despite his flaws, he is deeply lovable and genuinely cares about Malik.

**MR. BLOCK** *(Supporting)*

**Male | Any Ethnicity | Playing Age 35+**

The principal of Lawson High School. Strict, blunt, and tired of dealing with students who waste their potential. While he comes across as intimidating and frustrated, there is genuine concern underneath his authority.
## Audition Process

**🎥 Self-Tape Deadline:** **July 16, 2026**

Please submit:
* Headshot
* Self-tape
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel (if available)

Casting decisions will be made directly from submitted self-tapes. Due to our production timeline, there will be **no callbacks or second-round auditions**.

We look forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
CASTING CALL - "SLEEPOVER MOVIE" 

In the spring of 2016, 12 year old Alissa gets invited to a sleepover by the coolest girl she knows. But when things don't go to plan, she is forced to confront her insecurities in the maze of her mind.

Looking for volunteers to cast in this project! We are super open to having non-actors or actors at all levels of experience. If you are interested, please submit a headshot, introductory paragraph, resume or demo reel (whatever you have access to is perfect) to sleepovermovie2016@gmail.com.

Feel free to reach out on fb if you have any questions. 

Info/characters:

Vancouver, BC

August 8-9 

Non-union, volunteer 

And here are the roles!

• ALISSA  –  12 (Actor's age is flexible) Alissa is an angsty and socially awkward preteen who is used to finding herself on the outskirts of friend groups. She idealises the lives of girls who can easily belong.

• RACHEL - 12 - Outgoing and confident, she has been friends with Alissa since they were little. 

• TONYA - 12 The cooler, richer girl that stole Alissa’s best friend Rachel. Behind her glamorous facade, Tonya is compulsively obsessed with giving the appearance of a perfect life and maintaining her perfect best friend.

• NATALIE - 12 (Actor must be francophone) She is friends with Tonya and best friends with Natasha. 

• NATASHA - 12 - Likes to think of herself as more grown-up and nonchalant than the other girls. She is best friends with Natalie. 

 •JULES - 12 - She is a conformist who thrives on Tonya’s attention.

topComments.text: Is this a student project? Where will the project be shared?
Sent you a message Elodie BV

🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭
✨ MPP Character Entertainment is now casting performers for 2026! ✨

We have an exciting year ahead filled with magical parties, immersive events and fairytale experiences! We are looking for talented performers to join our growing team!

📍 Location: Manchester & North West, UK

⸻

🌟 About the Role:

• Most events are based in Manchester and across the North West, so local performers are strongly preferred

• 🚗 A full driving licence and access to a car is required (petrol costs covered)

• 👑 Casting for a range of characters, you may be suited to multiple roles

• 🎭 A background in musical theatre, acting or performance is ideal

• 💖 We’re looking for performers who are bubbly, kind, reliable and confident working with children

We offer flexible opportunities including temporary work, short-term contracts, weekly bookings, and cover shifts, perfect whether you want regular work or occasional gigs ✨

⸻

📩 How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a recent headshot to:

📧Manager@MPPCharacterEntertainment.com

Or drop us a private message to register your interest 💌

🌐 Website: www.manchesterprincessparties.co.uk

We can’t wait to welcome new performers and create even more magical moments in 2026! ✨

MPP Character Entertainment

items.summary:
🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭
✨ MPP Character Entertainment is now casting performers for 2026! ✨

We have an exciting year ahead filled with magical parties, immersive events and fairytale experiences! We are looking for talented performers to join our growing team!

📍 Location: Manchester & North West, UK

⸻

🌟 About the Role:

• Most events are based in Manchester and across the North West, so local performers are strongly preferred

• 🚗 A full driving licence and access to a car is required (petrol costs covered)

• 👑 Casting for a range of characters, you may be suited to multiple roles

• 🎭 A background in musical theatre, acting or performance is ideal

• 💖 We’re looking for performers who are bubbly, kind, reliable and confident working with children

We offer flexible opportunities including temporary work, short-term contracts, weekly bookings, and cover shifts, perfect whether you want regular work or occasional gigs ✨

⸻

📩 How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a recent headshot to:

📧Manager@MPPCharacterEntertainment.com

Or drop us a private message to register your interest 💌

🌐 Website: www.manchesterprincessparties.co.uk

We can’t wait to welcome new performers and create even more magical moments in 2026! ✨

MPP Character Entertainment

items.text:
**************THIS CASTING IS NOW CLOSED********************

THANKYOU SO MUCH TO EVERYONE THAT APPLIED, LIKED, SUPPORTED AND COMMENTED ON THIS POST. SUCH AN AMAZING COMMUNITY!!!!

*******************************************************************

CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

TENTH MAN FILMS is seeking to film an Independent Feature Film – Funding Teaser Trailer.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17"

An ambitious independent feature film is seeking an exceptional lead actress for a professionally produced teaser trailer to support feature film financing.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17" is a contained horror thriller with political suspense, blending the claustrophobic tension of "Buried" with the global stakes of "Contagion" and the relentless urgency of "24".

When a catastrophic zombie outbreak traps an international diplomat inside Room 17 of a failing hotel, she must stop the world descending into nuclear war using nothing but her intelligence, determination and a rapidly dying mobile phone—all without ever leaving the room.

The Role
This is a performance-led role for an actress capable of carrying the screen almost entirely through visual storytelling.
The teaser contains no dialogue, requiring subtle, truthful and emotionally engaging performance through expression, physicality and screen presence alone. The character is intelligent, composed and resourceful, but as events unfold she is pushed to her emotional and physical limits.

This is an exciting opportunity to become the face of a feature film currently entering the finance stage, with the intention of attaching cast and moving into full production following successful funding.

Casting Brief:
Female
Playing age: 35–55
Professional actress or experienced model with excellent on-camera presence.
Able to convey complex emotion without dialogue.
Strong dramatic ability and confident carrying scenes alone.
Previous film or television experience welcomed but not essential.

Shoot Details
Location: North West England
Shoot: One weekday afternoon/evening during July or August
Duration: Approximately 4–6 hours
Fee: £120

To Apply
Please submit:

Headshot.
Spotlight or Backstage profile.
Showreel (if available).
Current location (Cheshire based talent preferred, as there is no travel budget).
Weekday availability during July and August 2026 (TBC upon availability of cast actress/model).

Shortlisted applicants may be invited to attend an informal Zoom meeting before casting.

To contact, email MJB at tenthmanfilms@outlook.com

URGENT CASTING – LONDON / UK 🇬🇧

Looking for female actors / models aged 25–40 for a retail brand social media commercial.

We are looking for elegant, stylish and camera-friendly women based in London or nearby.

Shoot: 1 day in July
Location: London / UK
Fee: GBP 850 per person

Apply through Selfcast:
[https://selfcast.com/for-talents](https://selfcast.com/for-talents)

Casting@selfcast.com

Please update your profile with recent photos, full body photo and a short presentation video before applying.

Feel free to share with someone who fits the role.

items.text:
Hiya everyone! 

I am a young actor looking to re-enter the industry after doing lots of professional work some years ago. I’d love to participate in short films to create content for my showreel. Please contact me with casting calls on Ben.jbarker@outlook.com or my mobile at 07584956796. 

thanks!

topComments.text: If you were a young performer with an agent, you would know that you need to show your CV with your training, previous roles with the name of the production company & director. You would also know that in the UK you would need at the very least to have a Spotlight entry. Give an accurate history & people will try to help you with furthering your ambitions as an actor. Even unpaid student films are very competitive requiring  applicants to have an agent & Spotlight entry with professional headshots & credits.

sharedPost.text:
💎Dance Diamonds💎  26.09. - 27.09.2026 international dance competition Germany !!!
🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟Der Tanzwettbewerb richtet sich an Amateur-Tänzerinnen und -Tänzer ab der Alterskategorie 10 Jahre bis zur offenen Altersklasse.
🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.
🌟Competition program / Wettbewerbsprogramm:
💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Fortgeschritten/ Advanced:

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL — SPORTS MEDIA TALENT (PAID)**

Collax Drones is expanding its presenter and lifestyle talent roster for football media projects across the South West and Midlands.

We are casting for **two categories**:
**1. Presenters**
* Matchday intros
* Sponsor reads
* Kit reveal videos
* Club TV segments
* Drone activation intros
**2. Lifestyle / Visual Talent**
* Posing with media boards & hoardings
* Kit sponsor shoots
* Branding visuals
* Lifestyle football content
**We’re looking for:**
* Clean, modern aesthetic
* Confident but not chaotic
* Camera‑friendly presence
* Reliable and professional
* Influencer‑style look
**Requirements:**
* Must be reliable
* Must be able to travel to the South West and Midlands
(If you prefer one region, please state it)
**To apply:**

Email **Alex** at **collaxproperties@gmail.com** with:
* Recent photos
* Links to socials
* Your location
* Whether you prefer presenting or posing
**If applying for presenting:**

Please include a short video introducing yourself:
* Your name
* Your location
* Something interesting about you

Ideally filmed as a **long‑range shot** so we can gauge your presenting style and whether you suit our brand.
**Who this is perfect for:**
* New presenters
* Aspiring influencers
* Lifestyle models
* Anyone wanting to build a portfolio
* Anyone wanting to get into sports media

Ad‑hoc paid work. Travel covered for club shoots.

items.text:
Brad Pitt nailed it when he talked about how most actors shoot themselves in the foot during auditions:

"You're sitting in a room and you all kind of look alike… they're hearing the same thing, over and over. Then suddenly, someone comes in and does something different. And it lands."

As a producer who has sat through thousands of these, I can tell you he is 100% right.

Too many actors go into the room playing it completely safe. They do exactly what the script says, read the lines exactly how they think we want to hear them, and end up completely blending into the background.

In my latest video, I break down how you can actually apply Brad’s advice to your next audition. We cover:

🎬The cold-read trap: The simple physical mistake most actors make that completely hides their face from the panel.

🎬Making the "unobvious" choice: How to find that one small, distinct angle that actually makes a director put down their pen and pay attention.

🎬The neck brace story: A quick look at a real casting session where one bizarre direction completely unlocked a performance.

I also have a quick bone to pick with Brad at the end of the video.

As usual, the link is in the comments 👇

What’s the boldest choice you’ve ever dared to make in an audition room? Let me know in the comments—I'd love to hear how it went.

items.text:
Thinking of starting a career in Talent Agenting?

ANC is a new, small, growing talent agency managed by a single agent and is looking to expand by bringing on a freelance Talent Agent.

We're particularly interested in someone with knowledge of stage and musical theatre. Experience with theatre contracts, fees, and industry practices would be a big advantage.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to start or develop a career in talent representation while working with a supportive, growing agency.

https://www.ancagency.co.uk/become-an-agent

items.text:
Szukam TOP dziewczyn do krótkich nagrań promujących aplikację randkową🎥✨

Chcesz szybko zarobić bez większego wysiłku? 💸

Szukam dziewczyn, które:
✨ bardzo dobrze prezentują się przed kamerą,
🗣️ nie mają wad wymowy,
😊 są komunikatywne i swobodnie czują się podczas nagrań.

✅ Nagranie trwa około 20 minut ⏱️
✅ 150 zł gotówką wypłacane od razu po zakończeniu nagrania 💵
✅ Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia – liczy się naturalność i dobra prezencja 🌟
✅ Miła, luźna atmosfera 😄

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana, napisz wiadomość prywatną i wyślij kilka aktualnych zdjęć. 📸 Skontaktujęsię z wybranymi osobami.

🎥 **CASTING – Aktor/ka do filmu szkoleniowego**

Cześć! 👋

Szukam aktora lub aktorki do wcielenia się w rolę hosta/narratora w ok. 15-minutowym filmie szkoleniowym z zakresu cyberbezpieczeństwa.

**Szczegóły:**

🎬 Materiał: film szkoleniowy (5-6 odcinków po ok. 3 minuty, 15 min. łącznie) w ramach szkolenia LMS dla pracowników korporacji

📍 Lokalizacja: Kraków lub okolice

📆 Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 29 lipca (środa)

📲 Prawa: pełny wykup (buyout) – bez ograniczeń czasowych, terytorialnych i medialnych (perpetual, worldwide, all media)

💰 Stawka: do ustalenia

**Kogo szukamy?**

✅ Mężczyzna lub kobieta, około 30-40 lat

✅ Biegłe posługiwanie się językiem angielskim w mowie (poziom C1/C2) – **warunek konieczny**

✅ Wygląd naturalny, "zwyczajny" – szukamy autentyczności i wiarygodności, a nie wyglądu typowo reklamowego/komercyjnego

✅ Postura i wygląd reprezentacyjny, wzbudzający zaufanie

✅ Doświadczenie w wystąpieniach publicznych i/lub przed kamerą

📩 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na: [hello@konradniedziela.com](mailto:hello@konradniedziela.com)

*nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne na Facebooku.

Temat maila: **„Casting – szkolenie LMS"**

**Do zgłoszenia dołącz:**
* Imię, wiek, wzrost, miasto i numer telefonu
* 2–3 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)
* Demo/self-tape w języku angielskim
* Nagranie min. 30-sekundowej wypowiedzi w języku angielskim (dowolny tekst – czytany lub mówiony z głowy)
* Link do showreela/portfolio (jeśli posiadasz)
* Krótką informację o doświadczeniu aktorskim

Czekam na Wasze zgłoszenia! 😊✨

**ENG**

🎥 **CASTING – Actor for a Training Video**

Hi! 👋

I'm looking for an actor to play the role of host/narrator in an approx. 15-minute training video on cybersecurity.

**Details:**

🎬 Material: training video (5-6 episodes, approx. 3 minutes each, 15 min. total) as part of an LMS training program for corporate employees

📍 Location: Kraków, Poland or surrounding area

📆 Shoot date: 1 shooting day – July 29 (Wednesday)

📲 Rights: full buyout – perpetual, worldwide, all media

💰 Rate: TBD

**Who we're looking for:**

✅ Male or female, approx. 30-40 years old

✅ Fluent in spoken English (C1/C2 level) – required

✅ Natural, "everyday" appearance – we're looking for authenticity and credibility, not a typically commercial/advertising look

✅ Presence and demeanor that inspires trust

✅ Experience in public speaking and/or on-camera work

📩 Please send submissions to: [hello@konradniedziela.com](mailto:hello@konradniedziela.com)

*I don't respond to private messages on Facebook.

Email subject: "Casting – LMS Training"

**Please include in your submission:**
* Name, age, height, city and phone number
* 2–3 recent photos (headshot + full body)
* Demo/self-tape in English
* A recording of a min. 30-second statement in English (any text – read or spoken from memory)
* Link to your showreel/portfolio (if available)
* A brief note about your acting experience

Looking forward to your submissions! 😊✨

sharedPost.text:
WEŹ UDZIAŁ W NOWYM PROJEKCIE! 🎬

Ruszamy z castingiem do randkowego programu tv! Szukamy osób z 
charakterem, które nie boją się wyzwań, uwielbiają rozmawiać i chcą 
przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę przed kamerą. 🌟

Nasz program opiera się na autentycznych emocjach, spontanicznych 
reakcjach i interakcjach na żywo. Jeśli jesteś singlem/singielką i masz

w sobie „to coś” – czekamy właśnie na Ciebie!

👫 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✅ Kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-30 lat.
✅ Osób otwartych, komunikatywnych i przebojowych.
✅ Swobodnych przed kamerą i potrafiących ciekawie o sobie opowiadać.
✅ Osób o zadbanej aparycji, które są naturalne i autentyczne.
✅ Każdego, kto realnie chce poznać nowe osoby i nie boi się wyrażać 
własnego zdania!

Kluczowa jest dla nas Twoja energia i umiejętność prowadzenia ciekawej 
rozmowy. 💬

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Wyślij maila na adres: zgloszenia@castingstudio.pl

W treści zgłoszenia podaj:
1️⃣ Imię i nazwisko
2️⃣ Wiek
3️⃣ Numer telefonu do kontaktu
4️⃣ Dołącz 3 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz oraz sylwetka – wyraźne, bez

filtrów)

Nie zwlekaj! Daj sobie szansę na nowe znajomości i udział w wyjątkowym 
formacie. Może to właśnie Ciebie szukamy? 🌹✨

items.text:
Poszukujemy 3-4 Statystów z Warszawy — dwie osoby w wieku około 40 lat i dwie osoby około 24-30 lat o rozmiarach ubraniach S/M na plan fotograficzny dla marki luksusowych walizek i akcesoriów podróżniczych w dniu 23 lipca (czwartek) w Warszawie.

1. Zdjęcia wieczorne, sesja potrwa maksymalnie 4 godziny.

2. Wizerunek twarzy nie będzie publikowany.

3. Zdjęcia będą wykonywane przez profesjonalnego fotografa.

4. Wynagrodzenie: 250 zł netto — płatnie w ciągu 1 dnia (BLIK/numer konta bankowego).

Szukamy atrakcyjne osoby. W razie chęci wzięciem udziału, spełnienia wymagań i dostępności, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Rok urodzenia

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost

7. Rozmiar ubrania

8. Link do swojego profilu na Facebooku

9. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

10. Minimum trzy zdjęcia

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Sesja Warszawa

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w sesji zdjęciowej zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

ZAGRAJ W FILMIE! SZUKAMY KOBIETY W CIĄŻY!

Trwają zdjęcia do nowego komediowego filmu dla najbardziej znanej platformy streamingowej!

Szukamy Pani w widocznej ciąży. 

Krotki plan!

Przyjdź na plan i baw się świetnie razem z nami! 

Nie trzeba mieć doświadczenia! Zobacz jak wygląda powstawanie filmu od kulis! 

DATA: 16/07/2026 

(5h całość planu)

MIEJSCE: Warszawa

STAWKA: 300 zł dzień 

ZGŁOSZENIA:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

W TYTULE: Pani w ciąży 

W TREŚCI: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, wzrost, miejsce zamieszkania, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

items.text:
Volunteer Casting call 

In ISO actors to play the character Liam in an up coming metal band comedy series Ensemble

Lead Series Role: Liam (Fumbles) 

Playing Age 20-35

Shoot Commitment: High ( Appears in all episodes)

Description: The newest addition to Hangman's Graveyard. Fumbles has endless enthusiasm but almost no experience. Every task somehow becomes a disaster, yet his optimism never fades. Whether he's destroying equipment, booking the wrong gigs, or misunderstanding simple instructions, his heart is always in the right place.

The comedy comes from sincerity—not stupidity. The audience should genuinely root for him.

**Looking For:**
* Strong comedic timing
* Excellent physical comedy
* Able to improvise naturally
* Comfortable with slapstick
* Must take direction well
* Experienced guitar player 

**Preferred Skills:**
* Ability to play by ear a major asset
* Comfortable around motorcycles and live music
* Improvisation experience

If interested Email at connor.rombough@gmail.com

or our alternative Email at islandtreasurestudios@gmail.com for further audition details

items.text:
We wanted to share this latest audition notice from our friends at True Life Productions (TLP) - please share with anyone you think might be interested. 

Mary Stuart at Peterborough Cathedral.

True Life Productions (TLP), in collaboration with 49Knights, presents a new adaptation of John Drinkwater's theatre play Mary Stuart. 

Presented as a 60-minute live radio drama before an audience, the production reveals Mary as a woman of extraordinary intelligence, emotional depth, and resilience. 

This engaging theatrical experience, in the guise of a 1930s radio broadcast, makes historical drama accessible to contemporary audiences while preserving the richness of its setting and characters and forms part of the Mary Stuart Exhibition at Peterborough Cathedral.

TLP are looking for actors to play Beaton/Randolph (one female actor), Darnley (male actor) and Riccio/Bothwell (one male actor). All actors should be in playing ages between 35 and 50. 

If you are interested, email TLP at hello@truelifeproductions.co.uk for an audition pack.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'TRUE LIFE PRODUCTIONS In Collaboration with 49Knights PRESENT An adaptation of John Drinkwater's Drink Mary Stuart សិណសកតរត្ត់ CALL AST by Rosina Piovani IN TH GUISE OF ALIVE 1930S FRA RADIO AUDIA BROADCAST BROADC @ALL 2nd and 3rd CTEK PETERBOROUGH CATHEDRAL With the support of the Samuel Pepys House Trust 19:30hs (Doors open 18:45) INCLUDES ENTRY TO MARY STUART EXHIBITION'

items.text:
**CAST & CREW CALL FOR LONDON THEATRE PRODUCTION**

Hello, **Cunning Moss Productions** are looking for actors and crew for the upcoming production of "*Skin-for-Scales*" at *The Hope Theatre* for *North Sapph-Fest* on **August 27th & 28th**! The deadline for applications are on midnight on** ***Saturday 18th of July*, and we will be in touch on the week of 20th to announce selections and state schedule to start rehearsals on the week of 27th. Please note that this is an *unpaid* opportunity, however, any *profit* made will be *shared* back to creatives for their commitment.

We are looking forward to receiving emails from you at  cunningmossproductions@gmail.com that includes:

1. A brief introduction about yourself

2. Your general availability until show day on August 27th (+ Tech) & 28th, both at 7pm

3. Secondary Contact Information (Phone Number)

4. A Spotlight/Backstage or CV Link (or link to a General Reel for Range Review, or portfolio for those with existing production/concept work) 

5. Importantly- for actors, the Audition Tape, which should be an unlisted link.

Please look at the attached audition pack link here, or on our Instagram page @cunningmossproductions for more info.

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m6nrcJS6FvKKrKXC5gEw1crQu-uXUUb4/view?usp=drivesdk](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m6nrcJS6FvKKrKXC5gEw1crQu-uXUUb4/view?usp=drivesdk)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Cast & Crew Call Out The new poetic play "Skin-for-Scales" which is part of Hope Theatre' North Sapph-Fest on August 27th (tech + show day) & 28th pm) is looking for a: Leading Actress to play Pardis, the land-stuck girl (F/NB, Early 20s Appearance, Can Sing) Supporting Actress for Darya, The Ocean Mother (F/NB, 20s to 30s, Can Sing) Have availability fromJuly 27th and across August for rehearsals. Please look at the linked audition pack and submit your tape by the Saturday 18th July (Midnight) deadline to cumingmosproductions@gmail.co COT.'

May be an image of text that says 'We are looking for crew members to support the vision of this project, including: •Assistant Director to aid with Production ·Designer to aid with Reimagining our Set ·Music Composer transcribe and build our Mermaid/Ocear Melodies Assistant Director should have general availability to match and assistant in the rehearsal space and production coordination with Director and Producer. We are looking for people who are developing their skills and have great interest in the thematics and poetic aspects of the material. Please see linked document for application and project info, and submit for Saturday 18th ofJuly (Midnight) deadline to aumningmnosproductions@gmail.cm'
May be a doodle of text

POSZUKIWANI MŁODZI STATYŚCI (11-14 lat)
Jesteśmy studentami Warszawskiej Szkoły Filmowej i w dniach 20–22 lipca (poniedziałek – środa) będziemy realizować zdjęcia do naszego filmu dyplomowego. Nagrania odbędą się w przestrzeni Szkoły Podstawowej na warszawskiej Pradze.

Poszukujemy wielu młodych statystów (dzieci i młodzieży w wieku ok. 11-14 lat) Tematyka jest niezwykle ważna społecznie, historia opowiada o dziewczynce w spektrum autyzmu, która szuka akceptacji wśród rówieśników.

Informacje organizacyjne dla rodziców:

Termin: 20–22 lipca (poniedziałek – środa) – wakacje, więc to idealny czas na kreatywną przygodę.

Miejsce: Szkoła Podstawowa Warszawa (Praga).

Bezpieczeństwo: Na planie zapewniamy pełne bezpieczeństwo – dzieci przez cały czas będą pod opieką opiekuna. Gwarantujemy też świetną, wspierającą atmosferę.

Jeśli Wasze dziecko chciałoby wziąć udział w nagraniach (w wybrane dni lub w całym terminie), prosimy o bezpośredni kontakt z pionem produkcji filmu: mail - annabuczkowskaprod@gmail.com. 

Z góry bardzo dziękuję za pomoc i wsparcie młodego kina!

🎭 CASTING CALL – DIARY OF A WIMPY KID: THE MUSICAL 🎭

🌟 LONDON PREMIERE 🌟

Brookside Theatre, Romford is looking for performers aged 18+ to join our exciting profit share production of DIARY OF A WIMPY KID: THE MUSICAL!

We're casting ALL ROLES, including the iconic leads:
📚 Greg Heffley
😄 Rowley Jefferson
...and the full company!

Whether you're a seasoned performer or looking for your next exciting challenge, we'd love to hear from you.

📍 Brookside Theatre, Romford
🎭 Show Week: w/c 10th August 2026
💰 Profit Share Production
📧 To register your interest: casting@brooksidetheatre.com

Don't miss your chance to be part of the London premiere of this hilarious, heartwarming musical based on the bestselling books!

Tag someone who'd make the perfect Greg or Rowley, and please share to help us find our cast!

#DiaryOfAWimpyKid #DiaryOfAWimpyKidMusical #LondonPremiere #CastingCall #MusicalTheatre #Auditions #ActorsWanted #GregHeffley #RowleyJefferson #BrooksideTheatre #Romford #EssexTheatre #ProfitShare #TheatreLife

NOTES FOR MORE INFORMATION & AUDITION DETAILS INTERESTED? EMAIL: CASTING@BROOKSIDETHEATRE.COM WE CAN'T WAIT TOHEARFROMYOU! YOU!'

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Kuba, and I'm an 18-year-old actor based in Somerset, UK (moving to Brighton this September).

I'm at the beginning of my acting journey and looking to gain more experience. So far, I've appeared in a few student films, performed in two theatre musicals, and have experience in event hosting and presenting.

I'm currently looking for opportunities in:
• Film
• TV
• Commercials
• Music Videos
• Short Films
• Voice Acting

I'm passionate about developing my craft, building experience, and working with creative people on exciting projects.

A little about me:
• Based in Somerset (Brighton from September)
• Fluent in both English and Polish, with the ability to switch naturally between British English and Polish accents
• Singer and musician
• A Level Music Performance & Production Extended Diploma
• Enthusiastic, professional, reliable, and always eager to learn

I've attached a headshot, and I'd love to hear from anyone who thinks I might be a good fit for a current or future project.

Thank you for taking the time to read my post!

URGENT CASTING — SAN JOSE, CA

Our actor had to drop out last minute, and we are looking to cast someone ASAP for an independent film shooting in the next couple of days.

Role: Home Adoption Readiness Inspector / Consultant
Location: San Jose, CA
Rate: $150/hour
Time needed: 2–3 hours
Shoot window: Next couple of days

We are looking for someone who can play a calm, professional, trustworthy inspector/consultant type for a dramatic film scene. The role should feel composed, official, and grounded, but this is a fictional character for a film production.
All Ages, gender and experience welcome.

Production website: [https://www.ve-media.org/contact-us/](https://www.ve-media.org/contact-us/)

Please contact Marco as soon as possible:
[marco.lizarde@media.online](mailto:marco.lizarde@media.online)

Email is preferred, but Facebook DM is also okay.

Please include:
* Name
* Recent photo or headshot
* Reel or acting sample, if available
* Availability over the next few days
* Best contact number/email

Thank you!

items.text:
NEW YORK 

CASTING FOR Albany Post Road- The Series

Independent 1-hour prestige drama- CURRENTLY SEEKING SERIES LEADS 

Albany Post Road is an industrial family crime drama set in the fictional Hudson Valley village of Tannerville, New York. A new development project on the village's riverfront threatens the beliefs and core values of different residential cross-sections. Members of the community move chess pieces on the board, slowly unveiling a grand conspiracy. A heavy ensemble piece set to film in Northern Westchester, NY- Fall 2026. 

Non-Union- Unpaid 

THE MAJOR PLAYERS 

**Vincenzo “Vinny” Dilello (28-35)**

Italian-American. Muscular, restrained, observant, and methodical. A blue-collar welder newly paroled under an experimental progressive reform program. Vinny wants nothing more than peace and quiet, but his deep family ties and his protective nature force him to become the unwilling catalyst and shadow mayor in a slow-burning war over his town's future.

**Officer Raymond Santos (35-45)**

Dominican-American. Stocky with a commanding, grounded presence. A career Tannerville PD officer and a recovering cocaine addict who relies on his N.A. meetings to stay centered. Santos possesses deep insight into what truly deserves police work; he is a man whose humanity outshines his badge. which forces him to rely on off-the-books community policing and informants to protect his streets.

**Alfred Hopkins (50-65)**

African- American. Wiry, dense, and built tough from a lifetime of trade labor. A survivor of a 1970s police shooting, Alfred understands the necessary balance of might and right. A seasoned roofing contractor, with a purposed approach: His entire company employs young black men who used to bang in the streets. Alfred is a fierce objector to mass development that affects community interests. Driven by an overwhelming desire for fairness, he constructs a parallel justice system to protect Black-owned businesses and employment within the community.

**Mark Lombardi (32-40)**

Italian-American. Chubby, smug, with a spoiled "born on third base" mentality. Vinny’s cousin and the heir to a multi-million-dollar contracting empire. He is manipulative, highly ambitious, and is exploiting the town's waterfront renewal project. He must juggle his guilt over marrying Vinny's ex-girlfriend with his relentless drive for power.

**Vanessa Hopkins (25-35)**

African- American. Styled with natural hair and earth tones. A dental hygienist, single mother, and Alfred's niece. She is the unshakable moral grounding of the series, fighting for the community's progress. As Vinny’s primary love interest, she is forced to re-evaluate her boundaries about what is truly best for the community.

**Danielle Lombardi (28-35)**

Italian-American. Danielle was raised in a sheltered ethnic household. She understands everything her nonna says to her, but she responds in English. Spoiled is an understatement. Italian American Accent required.

Danielle's upbringing brought her to a place of entitlement. After Vinny broke up with her, he was sent to prison. He returned home to find that his own cousin, Mark, had married her. Danielle has now become spiteful; she has become twisted and manipulative. At this point, everything is about her; subtext is everything.

**Luca Daddario (30-36)**

Italian-American. Husky, heavyset, and built like a tank. The true blue-collar heart of the working class and Vinny's fiercely loyal best friend. As the owner of Golden Arms Welding, he struggles under financial stress to provide for his wife and son. His desperation pushes him to broker a deal that will change his business forever.

**Mayor Claude Simmons (50-60)**

Caucasian- A moderate politician desperately trying to salvage his legacy by pushing a massive riverfront redevelopment. He fights to be the "heart" of the town while juggling state initiatives, organized crime, and angry local voters.

**Randy Vanburen (60-70)**

Caucasian- A Vietnam War veteran and a proud member of the "old guard," and a village trustee in Tannerville, NY. He operates a chaotic metal shop and organizes a confederation of landowners to aggressively combat the town's development.

If you are interested in a role, please email Meeko@NoGimmicksMG.com

with your headshot, resume, and important details/ information. 
We will start with a self-tape request. In-person callbacks will be held the last week of July. Shooting begins mid-September.

Go to the link below to read more about the project

items.text:
CASTING 

UNTITLED TAROT READING CALL-IN SHOW
REAL PEOPLE
UNPAID

the.entity.xoxo@gmail.com

Filming the first episode of a call-in show hosted by a professional Tarot Reader & Spiritual Advisor. We are looking for interested callers who are in search of answers and would like to have a real reading over the phone that may be featured on the show.

If you are interested and ready to take the next step, please email: the.entity.xoxo@gmail.com to confirm your spot. We would love to hear a little bit about you and what sort of questions you need answered.

If selected, calls will take place on 7/20 & 7/21 in a time slot we provide to you (between 10:00AM - 6:00PM PST). Must be willing to sign an appearance waiver. 

Renowned Tarot Reader with 20 years experience in the metaphysical arts. Specializing in: Intuition, Astrology, Past Lives, Manifestation, Spiritual advisory, Difficult decisions, Romantic issues, Financial problems, Guided meditations, Dream Interpretation, Finding answers in unexpected places.

🔮🔮 Thank you 🔮🔮

items.title: S E L F T A P E S S T U D I O C I T Y:

items.text: SUBMIT TODAY!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 THE SPOTLIGHT IS BACK ON NYC! 🎬
The screen is descending and the red carpet is being rolled out in the heart of the city. Get ready—the 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is officially taking over New York City this October!
We are looking for the most bold, original, and boundary-pushing voices in cinema. Is your masterpiece ready for the big screen?

✨ CALL FOR SUBMISSIONS ✨
 REGULAR DEADLINE ENDS JULY 24

 🎬 Feature Films & Short Films
 🎥 Documentaries
 ✍️ Screenplays
 🤖 AI-Generated Works
 🎨 Animation
 🧸 Children’s Films
 
  FILMFREEWAY  #filmfestival #indiefilm #films #amttheater #art

items.summary: SUBMIT TODAY!
items.title: SUBMIT TODAY!

items.text:
I am going to be doing a series of online readings (on Zoom) with 2 to 3 hours of rehearsal a week to show the work we do at my studio.

If you’re interested in doing short bursts of hard work and then presenting it as a “online staged reading” that isn’t your mama’s staged reading…

DM me with info below ⬇️ in comments 

#stagedreadings #acting #actors

Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male early to late 30s but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. 

For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!

topComments.text: I emailed everything requested a few weeks ago. Thank you! Bradley

sharedPost.text:
Stage West Playhouse™ Announces Auditions for The Addams Family!

They're creepy, they're kooky, mysterious and spooky... and they're coming to Stage West Playhouse!

Director Brady Lay,  Music Director Osario Duraes, and Choreographer Lori Kohan are excited to announce auditions for our 2026 production of The Addams Family! This is the full ADULT cast version, there are limited roles for children. 

Audition Dates
Saturday, July 18, 2026 – 6:00 PM
Sunday, July 19, 2026 – 5:00 PM

Performance Dates
October 16–25, 2026

What to Expect
Auditioners should be prepared to:

Sing a 1–2 minute selection in the style of the show (a blue tooth speaker will be available).

Participate in cold reads from the script.

Learn and perform a short dance combination.
Dance Attire

Please wear clothing you can comfortably move in and closed-toe shoes.

No Crocs, sandals, flip-flops, or other open-toed footwear will be permitted during choreography.

Please bring a bottle of water, we always want you hydrated!

Video Auditions
Can't attend in person?

Video submissions will be accepted through 5:00 PM on Sunday, July 19, 2026.

Please email all video auditions to yamusicfl@gmail.com no later than the deadline.

Questions for Director Brady Lay may be directed to: yamusicfl@gmail.com.

About the Show
A comical feast that embraces the wackiness in every family, The Addams Family is a delightfully macabre musical comedy based on the beloved characters created by Charles Addams. When Wednesday Addams falls in love with a "normal" young man and invites his family to dinner, secrets, surprises, and hilarious chaos ensue in this heartfelt story about love, family, and growing up.

Principal Roles
Gomez Addams (Baritone/Tenor – Bb2–G4)
The passionate patriarch of the Addams family. Charismatic, romantic, funny, and devoted to Morticia while struggling to keep Wednesday's secret.

Morticia Addams (Alto/Mezzo – G3–Bb5)
Elegant, mysterious, and the calm center of the Addams household. Dry wit, strong presence, and deeply in love with Gomez.

Wednesday Addams (Mezzo/Soprano with strong belt – A3–E5) actor age: 17-25
Independent, intelligent, and fiercely loyal. The ultimate princess of darkness who unexpectedly falls in love.

Uncle Fester (Tenor/Character Tenor – C3–G4)
The lovable narrator of the story. Quirky, optimistic, and searching for his own true love... the Moon.

Pugsley Addams (Child/Young Teen Voice – A3–F5)
Wednesday's mischievous younger brother who fears his sister is growing up and leaving him behind.

Grandma (Character Alto/Mezzo – G3–G5)
The feisty, outrageous grandmother with a flair for potions, mischief, and saying exactly what's on her mind.

Lurch (Bass – Eb2–E4)
The towering family butler. Mostly silent... until he isn't. A memorable comedic role.

Mal Beineke (Baritone – C3–F4)
Lucas's practical, conservative father who prefers order over chaos.

Alice Beineke (Mezzo/Soprano – Ab3–G#5)
Lucas's sweet, tightly wound mother who discovers a whole new side of herself during dinner with the Addamses.

Lucas Beineke (Tenor – C3–C5)
A sincere, "normal" young man deeply in love with Wednesday.

Ensemble
The Ancestors are featured throughout the show as spirits of the Addams family from every era of history. This energetic ensemble sings, dances, and helps tell the story while portraying a wide variety of unforgettable characters.

Whether you're a longtime Stage West performer or auditioning for the very first time, we'd love to see you. Come join us for one of Broadway's funniest and most beloved musicals!

items.text:
Akut i morgen torsdag den 16. Juli. 
På vegne af en anden:

STATISTER SØGES TIL NY DANSK MUSIKVIDEO I KØBENHAVN (ULØNNET) 

Vi søger statister til optagelser torsdag d. 16. juli. Alle medvirkende bruges på dagen, men i forskellige tidsrum afhængigt af scenen.

Medvirken er ulønnet, men vi sørger selvfølgelig for forplejning til alle deltagere!

Vi søger:

Børn (7-12 år) 08.30-14.30 (man kan eventuelt være med fra 11:00-14:30 hvis man ikke har mulig for at deltage fra 8:30)

Vi søger en masse børn, som skal medvirke som elever i scener, der foregår på en skole

En forælder eller anden værge er meget velkommen til at være med under optagelserne. Vi har desuden en børneansvarlig, som sørger for, at alle børn har det godt og hjælper med at holde styr på gruppen. 

Alle børn skal have skriftlig tilladelse fra deres forældre eller værger, før de kan deltage.

Unge (18-25 år) med studenterhue (alle slags) Kl. 14.30-16.30

Vi søger unge med studenterhuer til en scene med festlig sommerstemning. Vi ser ikke navnene på studenterhuen, så hvis du kan anskaffe dig en hue og har lyst til at lege student i et par timer, så er du velkommen! 

"Foodtruck ejer + gæster" (Alle aldre 18+) 16.30-19.00

Vi søger 3-5 personer, som skal medvirke i en scene ved en foodtruck. Nogle skal forestille at arbejde i foodtrucken, mens andre skal være gæster i kø. 

Har du lyst til at deltage eller høre mere, så send en mail til:

brabrandcreative@gmail.com

Skriv gerne:

• Dit navn
• Din alder
• Hvilken rolle du er interesseret i (barn, student eller foodtruck)
• Et vellignende billede af dig selv
• Dit telefonnummer

Man må meget gerne melde sig til med sine venner eller familie. 

Vi glæder os til en sjov optagedag! 🎥✨
