items.text:
Für das studentische Abschlussprojekt **„Datensatz 27“** – ein atmosphärisches Sci-Fi-Kammerspiel im Found-Footage-Stil (ca. 90er/00er-Jahre-Ästhetik) – suchen wir unseren Hauptdarsteller.
* **Rolle:** DR. GABRIEL REHN (m, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre).
* **Typus:** Ein analytischer, anfangs distanzierter Datenanalyst, der sich bei der Untersuchung eines städtischen Störsignals in eine manische, existenzielle Obsession hineinsteigert.
* **Anforderung:** Starke Textarbeit (Umgang mit wissenschaftlichem Vokabular, das in nackte Panik umschlägt) und nuanciertes Präsenzspiel (Mikromimik) vor einer statischen Kamera.
* **Projektart:** Studentischer Kurzfilm (Abschlussprojekt). Perfekt für das eigene Showreel auf High-End-Niveau.

Ansprechpartner: André

Rollen-/Anforderungsprofil

DR. GABRIEL REHN (männlich, Spielalter ca. 28–40 Jahre)

**Der Charakter:** Gabriel ist ein hochintelligenter, rationaler Datenanalyst. Zu Beginn des Films ist er der kühle, distanzierte Wissenschaftler im Dienst eines Großkonzerns – absolut kontrolliert und pragmatisch. Im Laufe der zwei Tage (erzählt über die 6 Logs) bricht sein wissenschaftliches Weltbild jedoch komplett zusammen. Er steigert sich in eine manische, existentielle Obsession hinein, als er begreift, dass der freie Wille eine mathematische Illusion ist. Er wird von der eigenen Matrix, die er untersucht, psychisch komplett gleichgeschaltet.

**Deine schauspielerische Herausforderung (Die Degeneration):** Da der Film als statisches Kammerspiel inszeniert wird, liegt die gesamte Dynamik auf deiner darstellerischen Präsenz. Gefragt ist ein extrem nuanciertes, starkes **„Show, don't tell“-Schauspiel**. Die emotionale Abwärtsspirale und der paranoide Kontrollverlust müssen primär über deine Mikromimik, deine Körperhaltung und eine brüchiger und panischer werdende Stimme spürbar werden.
* 
* **Die Anforderungen im Detail:**
   * **Exzellente Textarbeit:** Du musst komplexe, mathematisch-wissenschaftliche Fachbegriffe (*Shannon-Entropie, stochastische Prozesse, Autokorrelation*) absolut flüssig, organisch und glaubwürdig vortragen können – wie ein Profi, für den das alltägliche Routine ist.
   * **Starke Präsenz:** Die Fähigkeit, den psychologischen Verfall einer Figur über feine Nuancen spürbar zu machen, während man fast ausschließlich direkt vor einer statischen Kamera agiert.

🎉 Congratulations to Jack!

We’re delighted to see Jack join The Casting Collective as a Supporting Artist.

Wishing him every success as he embarks on this exciting journey with a casting team behind major TV productions, feature films and commercials, while continuing his Musical Theatre training and development.

Here’s to an exciting future both on stage and on screen! 🎭🎬👏🎥🎤✨

#fypシ #foryouシ #viralpost #lightscameraaction

sharedPost.text:
Aspiring/Beginner Actors: Are you looking for some screen acting guidance and mentorship?🎬🌟

Hi, I’m Emma! I’m an Actress and Screen Acting Mentor based in the UK.

I’ve been involved in many productions for companies such as the BBC, Channel 4, Manchester Film School, SAE Liverpool and more.

The aim of the sessions is to give guidance on beginner screen actors who want tips on screen acting techniques and feedback on auditions, self tapes or monologues! My sessions are casual and informal, and are completely tailored to the individual and their level. I am DBS Checked.

All my lessons are online!

Before booking a session, I offer a FREE 10 min consultation, either by video call or phone. This is an opportunity for us to meet and discuss what you would want out of a session, and how I can best help you.

If you decide after the consultation you would like to book an online session, this can be arranged at a time that suits you!

Please message me if you’re interested in booking a free consultation, or simply want to know more about how I can help you☺️

Instagram: @taketwoacting

Thank you!

**** PAID CASTING NOTICE ****

Towers Film LV Productions is seeking a talented actress for its upcoming indie feature film.

Title: Towers

Tagline: Love is the signal that crosses every dimension

Synopsis: After their mother mysteriously disappears, two teenage sisters embark on an unforgettable journey that leads them to an ancient alien secret hidden beneath the Nevada desert.

Shoot Dates: August 1-2, 2026

Location: Las Vegas, NV

Shoot Length: 2 days

Rate: $200 flat

Union Status: Non-Union

ROLE:

PETRA 16yr (Supporting)

Female identifying, ages 18-24. Think Dustin from Stranger Things — super smart, funny and witty. Genuine comedic chops a must. Multicultural background preferred — Filipina, Pacific Islander, Southeast Asian or mixed heritage for this role.

$100 provided for travel to Las Vegas + hotel and meals, copy + profit participation in the project. Additional filming days end of Sept and Oct TBD. 

TO SUBMIT

Please send the following to: towerslvfilm@gmail.com

* Headshot

* Resume

* Acting reel or performance clips (required)

ATTN PLAYWRIGHTS: SEEKING NEW PLAY SUBMISSIONS!

True Repertory Theatre is seeking new play submissions for our September production of Playwright's Platform, a weekend of staged readings of new plays. We are proud to produce this festival for the third consecutive year!

INFO:

CONCEPT: Script in hand, staged readings.

LOCATION: The Beal House, 222 Main St., Kingston, MA.

REHEARSALS: September 20, 21, 23

PERFORMANCES: Friday, September 25 & Saturday, September 26 at 8pm & Sunday, September 27 at 3pm

DIRECTORS/ACTORS:  If your script is chosen, a director/actors will be provided.

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: Friday, August 14th 

SUBMISSIONS: Please send your script to: Truerepertorytheatre@gmail.com    Feel free to submit 10 minute plays, one-acts, full length!

We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
CALLING ALL YOUNG ACTORS, PARENTS, AGENTS & INDUSTRY FAMILIES!
THIS SUMMER... DON'T JUST TRAIN. LEAVE WITH THREE PROFESSIONAL SHOWREEL SCENES.
Perfect for young actors with or without representation, Spotlight members, drama students and anyone looking to break into the professional Film & TV industry.
Meladrama is proud to present three Screen Acting & Showreel Summer Schools, designed specifically for ambitious young actors who are serious about Film & TV.
WIGAN SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£140 if booked today | £160 in instalments
Tuesday 28th – Friday 31st July at Worsley Hall Community Centre, Wigan, WN5 9QE

PRESTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 3rd – Friday 7th August at Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Brownedge Lane, Preston, PR5 5AA

WARRINGTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 10th – Friday 14th August at St Wilfrid's Church Hall, Grappenhall, Warrington, WA4 3EP

Throughout the week, every actor will receive intensive professional coaching before filming THREE industry-standard showreel scenes in Native Accent, Received Pronunciation (RP) & General American. Every scene is professionally directed and filmed, giving actors fresh, high-quality footage to strengthen their Spotlight profile, impress agents and demonstrate their versatility to casting directors.
Unlike many showreel courses, our scenes are taken from real Film & TV scripts, carefully selected to suit each actor's age, casting type and ability.
Even better, every scene is performed opposite professional actors. Students will work directly with Melanie Ash and Leo Ashton, ensuring every performance is believable, natural and of the highest possible standard—no awkward scene partners, no uneven performances, just professional-quality footage you'll be proud to send to agents and casting directors.
Throughout the week students will receive specialist coaching in:
Screen Acting for Camera, Character Development, Audition Technique, Received Pronunciation (RP), General American Accent, Working with the Camera, Performance Direction, Industry Knowledge & Advice
Training is led by Melanie Ash—professional actor, director and acting coach, founder of Meladrama Acting Schooland CHAOS Actors Management. Melanie trained at the Manchester School of Acting and Manchester Metropolitan University, and her professional acting credits include Coronation Street, Emmerdale, Casualty, The Bay, Doctors, Ackley Bridge, Red Rose, Peterloo and numerous national television commercials. With over 30 years' professional experience, she has coached hundreds of young performers into successful careers in Film & TV, with students regularly securing roles for Netflix, BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Sky, HBO, Amazon Prime, and major feature films and TV Commercials. 
Students will also benefit from the experience of Leo Ashton, who began his professional acting career at just six years old. His credits include House of the Dragon, The Bay, Red Rose, Deep Water, Peterloo and more. As a young actor actively working within the industry, Leo offers invaluable first-hand insight into the realities and expectations of professional Film & TV acting.
Whether your child already has an agent, is building a Spotlight profile or is looking to break into the industry, this is an incredible opportunity to receive specialist training and leave with professional showreel material that can genuinely enhance future casting opportunities.
TRAIN. PERFORM. FILM. LEAVE INDUSTRY READY.
Can't attend every day?
No problem! We understand that many young actors have auditions, filming commitments and family holidays during the summer. Get in touch and we'll do our very best to create a bespoke package wherever possible, so your child doesn't miss out.
A quick note regarding representation...
This summer school is not an audition for CHAOS Actors Management, and attendance does not guarantee representation.
Melanie has built fantastic relationships with many of the UK's leading children's and young performers' agents over the past 30 years and fully respects existing agency representation. This course is designed purely to help every young actor develop their skills, confidence and professional showreel material—whether they're already represented or just starting their acting journey.
Places are strictly limited to ensure every actor receives plenty of individual coaching, rehearsal time and filming opportunities.
BOOK YOUR PLACE TODAY
https://forms.gle/8hq68hNBXqMCRBZn6

items.summary:
CALLING ALL YOUNG ACTORS, PARENTS, AGENTS & INDUSTRY FAMILIES!
THIS SUMMER... DON'T JUST TRAIN. LEAVE WITH THREE PROFESSIONAL SHOWREEL SCENES.
Perfect for young actors with or without representation, Spotlight members, drama students and anyone looking to break into the professional Film & TV industry.
Meladrama is proud to present three Screen Acting & Showreel Summer Schools, designed specifically for ambitious young actors who are serious about Film & TV.
WIGAN SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£140 if booked today | £160 in instalments
Tuesday 28th – Friday 31st July at Worsley Hall Community Centre, Wigan, WN5 9QE

PRESTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 3rd – Friday 7th August at Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Brownedge Lane, Preston, PR5 5AA

WARRINGTON SCREEN ACTING & SHOWREEL ACADEMY
£175 if booked today | £200 in instalments
Monday 10th – Friday 14th August at St Wilfrid's Church Hall, Grappenhall, Warrington, WA4 3EP

Throughout the week, every actor will receive intensive professional coaching before filming THREE industry-standard showreel scenes in Native Accent, Received Pronunciation (RP) & General American. Every scene is professionally directed and filmed, giving actors fresh, high-quality footage to strengthen their Spotlight profile, impress agents and demonstrate their versatility to casting directors.
Unlike many showreel courses, our scenes are taken from real Film & TV scripts, carefully selected to suit each actor's age, casting type and ability.
Even better, every scene is performed opposite professional actors. Students will work directly with Melanie Ash and Leo Ashton, ensuring every performance is believable, natural and of the highest possible standard—no awkward scene partners, no uneven performances, just professional-quality footage you'll be proud to send to agents and casting directors.
Throughout the week students will receive specialist coaching in:
Screen Acting for Camera, Character Development, Audition Technique, Received Pronunciation (RP), General American Accent, Working with the Camera, Performance Direction, Industry Knowledge & Advice
Training is led by Melanie Ash—professional actor, director and acting coach, founder of Meladrama Acting Schooland CHAOS Actors Management. Melanie trained at the Manchester School of Acting and Manchester Metropolitan University, and her professional acting credits include Coronation Street, Emmerdale, Casualty, The Bay, Doctors, Ackley Bridge, Red Rose, Peterloo and numerous national television commercials. With over 30 years' professional experience, she has coached hundreds of young performers into successful careers in Film & TV, with students regularly securing roles for Netflix, BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Sky, HBO, Amazon Prime, and major feature films and TV Commercials. 
Students will also benefit from the experience of Leo Ashton, who began his professional acting career at just six years old. His credits include House of the Dragon, The Bay, Red Rose, Deep Water, Peterloo and more. As a young actor actively working within the industry, Leo offers invaluable first-hand insight into the realities and expectations of professional Film & TV acting.
Whether your child already has an agent, is building a Spotlight profile or is looking to break into the industry, this is an incredible opportunity to receive specialist training and leave with professional showreel material that can genuinely enhance future casting opportunities.
TRAIN. PERFORM. FILM. LEAVE INDUSTRY READY.
Can't attend every day?
No problem! We understand that many young actors have auditions, filming commitments and family holidays during the summer. Get in touch and we'll do our very best to create a bespoke package wherever possible, so your child doesn't miss out.
A quick note regarding representation...
This summer school is not an audition for CHAOS Actors Management, and attendance does not guarantee representation.
Melanie has built fantastic relationships with many of the UK's leading children's and young performers' agents over the past 30 years and fully respects existing agency representation. This course is designed purely to help every young actor develop their skills, confidence and professional showreel material—whether they're already represented or just starting their acting journey.
Places are strictly limited to ensure every actor receives plenty of individual coaching, rehearsal time and filming opportunities.
BOOK YOUR PLACE TODAY
https://forms.gle/8hq68hNBXqMCRBZn6

items.text:
# PAID CASTING - HUMAN PINBALL SCENE-DEVELOPMENT LAB

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Compensation:** $25 CAD per hour (minimum three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop)
**Union Status:** Nonunion

Casting Vancouver-based performers for an initial paid scene-development lab for **Human Pinball**, an original one-hour dark-comedy television series.

The series follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, addiction and sobriety, failed ambition, and the enormous gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

This is **not** currently a full stage production or a theatrical adaptation of the complete pilot. Initial paid rehearsals will explore selected scenes from the series, with an emphasis on discovering character chemistry, comic rhythm, emotional truth, and which performers make the material impossible to ignore.

The work may incorporate minimal staging, voiceover, projected material, and fast transitions between past and present.

Strong performers and combinations may be invited into future paid workshops or public performances, but no larger production, ongoing company role, or filmed proof of concept is currently guaranteed.

## Roles
PAST REN - Lead

**Playing age:** Late 20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Trans man
**Ethnicity:** Open

Ren before medical and social transition. He is impulsive, sincere, defensive, resourceful, romantically overconfident, emotionally chaotic, and unintentionally funny.

Past Ren must be played as the same boy and man we meet later in the timeline - not as a lesbian, a woman performing masculinity, or someone consciously trying to appear masculine. He is already completely Ren internally, even though the people around him perceive him differently.

The role requires grounded comic instincts, emotional vulnerability, romantic confidence, and the ability to make Ren's wildly optimistic interpretations feel completely sincere.

Performers of all gender identities are welcome to submit if they are comfortable portraying the character on these terms.

JUNE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Confident, socially fluid, attractive without performing for attention, and difficult for Ren to read accurately.

The role requires understated comic timing, natural presence, and the ability to create believable romantic and sexual tension through genuine connection rather than heightened performance.

ELISE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Direct, charismatic, emotionally intelligent, and comfortable challenging Ren's assumptions.

Requires grounded flirtation, strong chemistry, quick comic instincts, and ease with emotionally charged dialogue.

## Compensation & Schedule

**Rate:** $25 CAD per hour

**Minimum:** Three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop

**Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Initial Schedule:** Approximately 2–4 paid sessions during July and August 2026, scheduled around cast availability.

Any future rehearsals, workshops, staged presentations, public performances, or additional work will be offered and compensated separately. Continued involvement is not guaranteed.

No travel or accommodation is provided. Applicants must be based in Metro Vancouver or able to work locally.

## Content

No nudity or simulated sex.

The material includes mature language and references to dating, sexuality, alcohol, drug use, addiction, police restraint and arrest, gender dysphoria, death, financial distress, and emotionally vulnerable autobiographical experiences.

Specific scene content and physical requirements will be disclosed before rehearsals or auditions. Performer boundaries and consent will be respected throughout the process.

## How to Submit

Please reply directly to this post or email info@crowdcue.ca

Include:
* Your name
* The role you'd like to be considered for
* Your location
* Acting résumé or brief experience summary
* Headshot or recent photo
* A link to an existing reel, self-tape, scene, or other performance footage
* Your general availability during July and August 2026

A custom audition tape is **not** required for the initial submission. Shortlisted performers will receive a brief audition scene and character context for the next stage.

Please use the subject line:

**HUMAN PINBALL CASTING - [ROLE]**
items.summary:
# PAID CASTING - HUMAN PINBALL SCENE-DEVELOPMENT LAB

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Compensation:** $25 CAD per hour (minimum three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop)
**Union Status:** Nonunion

Casting Vancouver-based performers for an initial paid scene-development lab for **Human Pinball**, an original one-hour dark-comedy television series.

The series follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, addiction and sobriety, failed ambition, and the enormous gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

This is **not** currently a full stage production or a theatrical adaptation of the complete pilot. Initial paid rehearsals will explore selected scenes from the series, with an emphasis on discovering character chemistry, comic rhythm, emotional truth, and which performers make the material impossible to ignore.

The work may incorporate minimal staging, voiceover, projected material, and fast transitions between past and present.

Strong performers and combinations may be invited into future paid workshops or public performances, but no larger production, ongoing company role, or filmed proof of concept is currently guaranteed.

PAST REN - Lead

**Gender:** Trans man

sharedPost.text:
Aspiring/Beginner Actors: Are you looking for some screen acting guidance and mentorship?🎬🌟

Hi, I’m Emma! I’m an Actress and Screen Acting Mentor based in the UK.

I’ve been involved in many productions for companies such as the BBC, Channel 4, Manchester Film School, SAE Liverpool and more.

The aim of the sessions is to give guidance on beginner screen actors who want tips on screen acting techniques and feedback on auditions, self tapes or monologues! My sessions are casual and informal, and are completely tailored to the individual and their level. I am DBS Checked.

All my lessons are online!

Before booking a session, I offer a FREE 10 min consultation, either by video call or phone. This is an opportunity for us to meet and discuss what you would want out of a session, and how I can best help you.

If you decide after the consultation you would like to book an online session, this can be arranged at a time that suits you!

Please message me if you’re interested in booking a free consultation, or simply want to know more about how I can help you☺️

Instagram: @taketwoacting

Thank you!

We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

Use this link to read the June/July Edition of Center Stage Magazine https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ
items.previewTitle: What does the future of Voice Acting look like? | CAVA, NAVA, LAVA, AAVA chime in | CENTER STAGE

**SENIOR (60-75lat) i WNUK (13-15 lat) - WROCŁAW**
Fundacja Averis – Młodzi Mogą Więcej poszukuje aktorów do ról seniora i wnuka!  🎞️🎬

Jeśli masz 13–15 lub 60–75 lat, napisz do nas na adres: [mlodzi.moga.wiecej.mmw@gmail.com](mailto:mlodzi.moga.wiecej.mmw@gmail.com) albo wyślij wiadomość na Messengerze na mój profil.

Realizujemy 15-minutowy film krótkometrażowy w ramach naszych działań na rzecz aktywizacji młodzieży oraz wspierania pasji i rozwoju młodych ludzi. Całość będzie realizowana pod opieką zawodowego operatora kamery, z wykorzystaniem profesjonalnego wyposażenia. To projekt zarówno dla osób z doświadczeniem, jak i debiutantów! Za scenariusz i reżyserię odpowiada młody twórca, który zwyciężył w naszym konkursie na scenariusz filmowy. 

Jeśli jesteś młodym aktorem i chcesz wziąć udział w takim projekcie albo seniorem, który chce dołożyć swoją cegiełkę do wspierania rozwoju dolnośląskiej młodzieży, napisz do nas!

Projekt ma charakter non-profit. Podczas dwóch najdłuższych dni nagraniowych zapewniamy obiad i napoje.

Jest to nabór dodatkowy – do pozostałych ról zgłosiło się już wielu kandydatów. Najbliższy casting odbędzie się w sobotę 18 lipca, w godzinach 12:00–17:00.

Więcej informacji o projekcie znajdziecie tutaj:
[https://averismmw.eu/rekrutacja/](https://averismmw.eu/rekrutacja/)

Do zobaczenia! 🎬🔥

sharedPost.text:
Meine lieben Fans und Freunde ‼️‼️
unser nächstes großes Highlight in unseren wunderschönen Eventgarten/Schwanenstadt O.Ö steht in den Startlöchern...sehr gerne lasse ich mir immer wieder was neues einfallen....und habe mir auch ganz neue super tolle  Künstler  aus Deutschland dazu eingeladen die das erste Mal in meinen Eventgarten  auftreten werden..... alle zusammen freuen wir uns schon riesig auf eine Mega tolle Schlagernacht und das ganz in Weiß....Karten und Reservierungen ab sofort bei mir möglich unter PN oder daniela@urich.at ..herzlichst Eure Daniela Urich mit Fam. und Team🤝🤝🤝🤝👍👍👍👍🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹💪💪💪💪💪

media.ocrText: Ist möglicherweise ein Bild von Text „DANIELA URICHI'ST Evenganten präsentiert DIE GROBE SCHLAGERNACHT GANZ INWEIß SA.228.'26 GARNI, Stadtplatz 37, Schwanenstadt DANIELAURICH BEGINN 1800 UHR EINLASS 163 UHR diesem stilvollen" Abend hat sich die Gastgeberin Daniela Urich besonders tolle hochkarätige und Internationale Künstler der Schlager- musik eingeladen. einerlauen Sommernacht, Sternenhimmel gemütlich sitzend, elegant Weiß gekleidet, kann diese musikali- schen und Klängen der einzelnen Interpreten lauschen und geniessen. Bestens versorgt wird man dabei mit Speis und wie gewohnt von Familie Urich! Simona Gründarf Captian Freddy Gabriela Freie Platzwahl, Karten Anmeldung unter oder ManuelaLoven daniela@urich.at. Karten erhältlich bei Urich Bäder-Heizung Vöcklabruck, Intercoiffure Daniela Urich Schwanenstadt www.daniela.at Ticketpreise: 25,-“

**VOLUNTEER BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED — TORONTO**

We are looking for **5 volunteer background actors/extras** to support an independent short-film production.

**Date:** Sunday, July 19, 2026
**Call Time:** 4:00 p.m.
**Estimated Filming Time:** Approximately 3 hours
**Location:** Near 720 Spadina Ave., Toronto
**Role:** Participants in a community meeting scene

No acting experience is required. **Food will be provided, and all participants will receive screen credit.**

Your support would mean a great deal to our cast and crew.

To participate, please email **[zoeyfilm77@gmail.com](mailto:zoeyfilm77@gmail.com)** with your name, phone number, and a recent photo.

Thank you for supporting our film!

items.text:
I’m recruiting on behalf of Box Out Bullying for a paid full-time national touring educational theatre production.

We’re seeking a male actor, playing age 23–30, with strong comedic instincts, excellent ensemble skills, and ideally some improv experience to perform interactive anti-bullying programs in schools across the United States.

The full casting notice, including compensation, qualifications, schedule, and application instructions, will be provided upon request.

If you’re interested or know someone who would be a great fit, please email jonathon@fullyinvestednetwork.com.

Please feel free to share this opportunity with anyone who may be interested. Thank you!

items.text:
Hey all you cool cats & kittens!!! Come have some fun in the sun!!! 

CFVA Summer Bash!!!!! Woohooo!!!

Join us for the CFVA Summer Bash, Colorado's can't-miss summer networking event for the production and media arts community! Whether you're behind the camera, in front of it, or making the magic happen behind the scenes, this is your chance to connect with fellow creatives in a fun, relaxed setting. Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!! 

• Sunday, August 2, 2026, 4:00 PM

• The Buntport Theater, Denver, Colorado 

• [https://bit.ly/4gyGys7](https://bit.ly/4gyGys7?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaTlPemlkOXN3WkxKVHd4cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6OaTol4XZ4rCwvvURQbhMX_d9BLstM6AH34hykXpEpYnyGg71WvbCy7R_jGQ_aem_AvAJiHw9laj5e1AQsFRXtA) 

Why Attend?
* IT'S SO FUN 
* Expand Your Network
* Meet filmmakers, producers, directors, editors, writers, actors, crew members, content creators, and industry professionals from across Colorado.
* Discover New Collaborations
* Whether you're looking for your next project, your next client, or your next creative partner, Summer Bash is the perfect place to start the conversation.
* Strengthen the Colorado Artist Community - across the mediums!! Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!!
* Build meaningful relationships, share ideas, and help grow a stronger, more connected community throughout the state.
* Celebrate the Industry
* Take a break from production schedules and enjoy an afternoon with the people who make Colorado's media industry thrive.

Event Highlights

• Free Admission – Everyone is welcome, but registration is encouraged.

• Food Trucks On Site – Grab dinner or a snack from a selection of local food trucks offering a variety of delicious options for purchase.

• Indoor & Outdoor Venue – Stay cool and comfortable at the unique Buntport Theater. 

• Networking & Community – Make new connections, reconnect with familiar faces, and celebrate Colorado's vibrant production/performing arts industry.

Whether you're a longtime CFVA member, new to the industry, or simply curious about Colorado's creative community, the CFVA Summer Bash is a welcoming opportunity to meet new people, exchange ideas, and build relationships that can lead to future collaborations.

Register today and join us on August 2 for an afternoon of community, conversation, and connection. We can't wait to see you at the Summer Bash!

items.text:
Hello all, 

First off, thank you for your overwhelming support and application for “Miss. Lonelyhearts Memory Light” - I made a post on here for our feature a few weeks ago and received way more engagement than I expected. Because of this community, we have been able to track down the perfect cast for our film and my heart is full. Now I only have one major role left to cast -

Delia - Female, Age 35 - 50 - Kids foster Mom. Appears primarily at the beginning and end of the film. In the finale, she is dressed completely in white, representing the "safe place" Kid eventually chooses over her father. Currently scheduled for August 5th and 7th.

If interested, please send an email to rowanharper386@gmail.com and be sure to attach a headshot and a reel if you have it. Note, we are currently working with deferred pay and I’d be happy to discuss that with you.

Additionally, we are looking for 1-3 child extras (Ages 8-12) for our first shoot day, this Wednesday - July 15th. If you have a child who would be interested, or know someone who does, please send me an email and I’d be happy to answer any questions.

Hope to chat soon,
Rowan

topComments.text: Is 15 too old for a child extra?

STILL NEED 2-3 PARTS FOR "MYSTERY BOXES"
July 25, each part requiring 2-3 hours.

DAD/CUSTOMER 

Male, 30-55 years old

A dad looking to buy gifts for his wife and son in the laziest way possible.

BAD/OMINOUS MAN 

Male 25-60 years old

An ethereal character of vague origins. Imposing, scary.

REPORTER

Female, 20-40 years old

A news reporter on-site describing a situation.

Each role pays $15/hr.

Message me for any details. Looking for brief audition videos which I can provide lines for.

Thank you!

items.title: LEAD ACTOR REQUIRED

items.text:
💰TRAVEL AND FOOD/DRINK ON DAY WILL BE PAID FOR 

LOGLINE- ‘’A grieving couple struggle to reconnect after an unimaginable loss, finding themselves united only by memories.

🎥 After, April is an intimate, dialogue-free short film exploring grief, guilt and unconditional love. Through carefully observed moments and powerful visual storytelling, two expectant parents attempt to navigate the silence left behind after tragedy. As they confront blame, heartbreak and the fear of moving forward, a small teddy bear with angel wings becomes a symbol of the child they lost.

👫Looking for a male and female lead, any ethnicity (ages of 25-35).
🧍‍♀️Lydia- This role relies almost entirely on subtle facial expressions and physical performance rather than dialogue.
🧍Liam- A nuanced, naturalistic performance is essential.

📍Filming in Birmingham, England (in apartment) 1st-2nd September 2026.

⚠️This film covers topics some may find harmful; Child-loss, grief, emotional distress and mental health. 

IF INTERESTED PLEASE CONTACT:
✅gracielillyhenry@icloud.com 
or 
✅DM this account 

(Share this post with people you think may be interested🫶🏽)

items.text:
उत्तर आधुनिकवादी नृत्यकला :-

उत्तर आधुनिकतावादी नृत्यकला आधुनिक नृत्यको औपचारिकता र अभिव्यक्तिवादी नृत्यकलाको प्रतिक्रिया स्वरुप आएको हो ।
आधुनिक नृत्यको प्रारम्भिक काल (१८८०-१९२३), मध्य काल (१९२३-१९३६) र उत्तर काल (१९३६-१९६०) को दशकमा प्रयोग गरिएको कठोर नृत्य कोरियोग्राफीको आदर्श प्रस्तुतीकरण एवं रचनात्मकताको प्रतिक्रियामा आएको नवीन विचारधारा थियो ।

आसुरचना गर्नु, नृत्य निर्माणको उदेश्यमा केन्द्रित, दर्शकहरुको अपेक्षालाई चुनौती दिने, गैर प्रशिक्षित कलाकारहरुको प्रयोग, आदि मुख्य विशेषता रहेको उत्तर आधुनिकतावादी नृत्य समकालीन राजनीतिक विचारधाराबाट प्रभावित थियो । जसमा रङ्गभेद आन्दोलन, भियतनामी युद्ध बिरोधी आन्दोलन, नारीवादी आन्दोलन, जस्ता परिवेशहरुले नृत्य सिर्जनामा प्रभाव पारेको थियो ।
सन १९६०-७० को प्रारम्भिक उत्तर आधुनिकतावादी नृत्यको जगमा सन १९७९- ९० को दशकहरुमा यो विचारधारा परिपक्व भएको थियो । जसलाई विश्लेषणात्मक उत्तर आधुनिकतावादी नृत्य भनेर नृत्य इतिहासमा दर्ज छ ।
Ramesh Rai 
K-Drama Highlights

items.text:
American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

[#AmericanPlaylistTheater](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/americanplaylisttheater?__cft__[0]=AZZozhBBsejXvOiaH5feV7yB9hPJ_2ZffA7CFZNst7l5hhM-LimI3cQG2MW0srnj7a59o9SFermFJyejpqnH-WznfuYsevr40X6o3Ew35AueVQ&__tn__=*NK-R) THE STAGE IS CALLING. Season Auditions are OPEN!

Orlando Family Stage is searching for the next incredible artists to join our 2026–2027 Centennial Season!

From world premieres to beloved favorites, this season brings stories to life for thousands of young audiences and families across Central Florida and we want YOU to be part of the magic. 

We are currently accepting video auditions for our upcoming season, featuring:

🎃 The Best Halloween Ever — World Premiere
🎄 A Charlie Brown Christmas Live on Stage!
🐱 Pete The Cat’s Big Hollywood Adventure
✨ A New Spring Musical — World Premiere (title coming soon!)
🐉 Dragons Love Tacos 2: The MuSequel

All roles are paid, and performers ages 11+ are encouraged to audition. Orlando Family Stage is committed to inclusive casting and welcomes performers of all backgrounds and experiences.

Ready to bring your talent, creativity, and imagination to the stage? Audition details, submission guidelines, and everything you need to know are waiting for you at the link in our bio. 🎭

📅 Video submissions are due July 26, 2026.

Know an actor who belongs on this stage? Tag them below and help spread the word! ⬇️

https://orlandofamilystage.com/get-involved/auditions/

#OrlandoAuditions #ActorAuditions #OrlandoTheatre

items.text:
CASTING CALL — "Inside Job" (short film, psych thriller)

LA · Aug 14-16 · Non-union · Paid

A contained, single-location descent into one man's unraveling mind. Dark, restrained, visually driven.

YOUNG DETECTIVE (lead) — Male, playable early 30s. Starts sharp and composed, comes apart across the film. Need real range: control and total collapse, sometimes in the same scene. Stage-trained welcome. All 3 days, $150-200/day.

SENIOR DETECTIVE (supporting lead) — Male, 50s-60s. Weathered, old-Hollywood look. Calm, quietly knowing. Presence over performance. All 3 days, $125-150/day.

THE GIRL (supporting) — Female, late 20s. One flashback day: warm in one glimpse, quietly devastating in another. Also voices a separate O.C. therapist role. 1 day, $100-150 for both.

Meals, footage for your reel, IMDb credit. Organized set, call sheets in advance. Heads up: non-functional prop weapon and stage blood involved, full safety protocol on set.

To submit: fill out the form in the first comment (headshot + reel link required — submissions without footage won't be considered; stage credits welcome for the Senior).

DMs work too if forms aren't your thing. Sides go out to shortlisted actors.

[https://forms.gle/yaKJ2Va7gPtikbvLA](https://forms.gle/yaKJ2Va7gPtikbvLA)

**Seeking single fathers and single men (40s–60s) for a paid dating show in LA **

We are casting single parents (40s–60s) with adult children (17+) as well as single men (40s–60s) without children. 

The format is a dating show where a lineup of singles hold a red balloon and pop it the moment they lose interest, then explain why on camera. This will be filmed for Youtube.

📍 Los Angeles
📅 July 9th
💰 $500 / 3 hours (exact time TBD)

If you or anyone you know is interested please reach out to Casting Director: [daniellaforero@gmail.com](mailto:daniellaforero@gmail.com)

This is a non-union production by a well known Youtuber (18M subscribers).

A $50 referral fee will be paid to anyone who refers talent that gets successfully cast.

Thanks!

items.text:
Hi everyone!
My name is Elvira Nsibi Eneme, writer, director, and producer. Like many of you, I have a dream. I may not have all the resources yet, but that won’t stop me from making it a reality.

I’m looking for passionate, reliable people who want to gain experience, build their portfolios, make industry connections, and be part of an ambitious psychological thriller series.

SERIES

Swimming in Red

Logline

After the apparent death of her younger sister, acting coach Niusha embarks on a relentless path of vengeance that draws her into a hidden world of secret rituals, powerful criminal organizations, and dangerous alliances—where every step toward the truth pulls her deeper into darkness.

OPEN POSITIONS

* Production Assistant

* Gaffer assistant 

* Sound Assistant 

* Art Department Assistant

* Set Designer asistant 

* Script Supervisor Asistant 

* Hair & Makeup Artist Assistant 

SHOOT INFORMATION

📍 Location: North Hollywood, California

🎬 Filming: Episode 1 

📅 Shoot Day: Sunday, August 23

📆 Production meetings and future filming will also take place on Sundays.

COMPENSATION

This is an unpaid independent production.

We offer:

* IMDb and on-screen credits

* Valuable on-set experience

* Portfolio material

* Networking opportunities

* The opportunity to be part of an exciting series from its very first episode.

CONTACT

📧 enemestudios90@gmail.com

items.text:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ

items.text:
CREW CALL — COFFEE (short film)

I'm Jerone Arnold Darden (Studio JeADa), and I'm building the crew for COFFEE — an intimate, character-driven short film shooting here in the Lehigh Valley this fall (September/October). I'm looking for collaborators who want to make something real with care, and I'd especially love to hear from Black and LGBTQ+ creatives.

Roles I'm filling (looking for a few people per role so I can find the right fit):

CAMERA & LIGHTING — 1st AC, Gaffer, Grip

SOUND — Production Sound Mixer / Boom Op

PRODUCTION — Producer / Line Producer, 1st AD, PAs, Script Supervisor

ART & LOOK — Production Designer / Art, Wardrobe, Hair & Makeup

POST — Editor, Colorist, Sound Designer / Mixer, Composer

ON SET — BTS Photographer/Videographer, Craft Services

A note on pay: this is a deferred project — crew will be compensated as the film's funding comes together, with credit, meals on set, and footage for your reel. I'll always be upfront about where things stand.

Interested? Email me at jerone@studiojeada.com (or DM) with the role you're drawn to, a quick word about you, and a reel or portfolio if you have one. Please share with anyone who'd be a fit.

Let's build something good. — [Jerone Arnold Darden](https://www.facebook.com/groups/293533982596738/user/100048935211813/?__tn__=-]K-y)

[https://www.studiojeada.com/#page-coffee](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.studiojeada.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExTTVOaUJVVU9ZYUtqeXRUc3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4q5u60y_N7AJyaRzoXxobAPIXk1w1oqjL6wSyFTffrVaQLukbBIKj91yDCYA_aem_m7GBiRF2MtUQgWKVTzXbpQ%23page-coffee&h=AUBkIbEKzPPUWXhgXlj6r4k39xC_Bs69qao4ggwDUE4CgAyvew2tRzcYb7PEJi41bvj10dOU9cmZMR3DE8tC68ekqm7t0puQeh3frW1yZmVzoU-KhG9v6idlbObUCQX99yo0BsARwz0Qim-Vy4yLFK33WkQ5tQ&__tn__=-UK-y)

sharedPost.text:
💎Dance Diamonds💎  26.09. - 27.09.2026 international dance competition Germany !!!
🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟Der Tanzwettbewerb richtet sich an Amateur-Tänzerinnen und -Tänzer ab der Alterskategorie 10 Jahre bis zur offenen Altersklasse.
🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.
🌟Competition program / Wettbewerbsprogramm:
💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Fortgeschritten/ Advanced:
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens;
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
All age groups and all dance styles.
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎- Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💢 27.09.2026
​Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Beginners/ Novices
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
💎Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
🌟All age groups and all dance styles.​
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎 - Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💥Registration/ Anmeldung bis 10.09. 2026 möglich / Registration is open until September 10, 2026.
🔥Das Wettbewerb präsentiert über Livestream für alle Interessenten kostenfrei und ohne extra Anmeldung über unsere Online Plattform.
💥Award -  die Bewertung läuft nach Punkten System von hochkarätige Jury.
Die Gewinner der 1 - 2 - 3 erhalten Pokale und Medaillen.
🏆 🥈🥈🥈 🥉🥉🥉 🥇🥇🥇 🏆
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
"Dance Diamonds Kids" 19.12. - 20.12.2026
Die Anmeldung ist vom 01.10.26 bis zum 06.12.26 möglich.
🌟Das Wettbewerb ist speziell für junge Performerinnen und Performer im Alter von 3 bis 12 Jahren organisiert. Die Teilnahme erfolgt in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group und Group.
🌟Zudem werden die Teilnehmer nach ihren Vorbereitungsstufen, sei es für Einzelperformer oder Tanzgruppen, in unterschiedliche Kategorien eingeteilt.
🌟Auf der Webseite www.art-element.de finden Sie detaillierte Informationen über unser Team, unsere Projekte- und Events - Programme sowie Archive.
Für weitere Fragen stehen wir Ihnen gerne telefonisch oder per WhatsApp: 0049-1577- 3131438 zur Verfügung.
💎DANCE DIAMONDS
Stadthalle Kleve, Lohstätte 7 · 47533 Kleve, NRW,Germany
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
Stadthalle Hückelhoven,Rathausplatz 1, 41836 Hückelhoven, NRW, Germany

items.text:
CASTING CALL - Horror/Dark Comedy Short Film

An obsessive Canucks fan must break a curse which he believes connects his life to the Vancouver Canucks in all the wrong ways.

A film about what it’s like to be a Vancouver Canucks fan. 

Email your headshots, resume, and demo reel (if applicable) to canuck.movie@gmail.com and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for. If you’re a good match, we’ll send the sides over right away.

Read below for more information.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PERFORMERS & PERSONALITIES
Music Video: "STRUT" by BEACHTITZ

Location: City Centre Motor Hotel – Vancouver, BC�Shoot Date: Monday, July 20�Time: Approximately 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM�Compensation: Unpaid (Professional Footage + Credit)

We're transforming a retro Vancouver motel into a bold, neon-soaked underground spectacle for the final scene of "STRUT."

This isn't a traditional party scene—it's a celebration of individuality, confidence, and people who own every room they walk into. Think rebellious glamour, underground nightlife, and unforgettable personalities.

We're casting:

* Drag queens

* Fire performers*

* Circus performers

* Stilt walkers

* Flow artists (LED, poi, hoops, fans, etc.)

* Burlesque performers

* Dancers (all styles)

* Roller skaters

* Alternative models

* Tattoo artists, musicians, and creatives with standout style

* Fashion-forward personalities

* Anyone with an unforgettable look and commanding presence

No acting experience is necessary. We're looking for people who are expressive, comfortable on camera, and excited to help create a visually iconic scene.

Wardrobe Inspiration

Think bold, glamorous, expressive, rebellious, high fashion, leather, sequins, latex, vintage, punk, queer nightlife, festival couture, or anything that makes you feel unstoppable. This is your chance to show up as your most confident self.

What You'll Receive

* Professional footage for your reel or social media

* Credit in the official music video

* The opportunity to collaborate with an incredible community of local artists

To Apply

Please send:

* 2–3 recent photos

* Your Instagram

* A brief description of what you do

* Performance photos or videos (if applicable)

DM myself or @BEACHTITZ

Or email breaschneidertalent@gmail.com with the subject line:

"STRUT – MOTEL TAKEOVER"

Let's build a scene that feels like Vancouver's wildest underground night never ended.

*Fire performers must be experienced professionals with their own safety equipment. Any fire performance will be subject to location approval, safety protocols, and production requirements.

Music Video: "STRUT" by BEACHTITZ

Location: City Centre Motor Hotel – Vancouver, BC�Shoot Date: Monday, July 20�Time: Approximately 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM�Compensation: Unpaid (Professional Footage + Credit)

We're transforming a retro Vancouver motel into a bold, neon-soaked underground spectacle for the final scene of "STRUT."

This isn't a traditional party scene—it's a celebration of individuality, confidence, and people who own every room they walk into. Think rebellious glamour, underground nightlife, and unforgettable personalities.

items.text:
**🎬Kraków - zlecenie płatne 💰**

🙋‍♀️**Poszukujemy kobiety w wieku 20-35 lat**, do głównej roli w filmie promocyjnym. 
Rola polega na wcieleniu się w turystykę zwiedzającą Kraków oraz korzystającą z jego atrakcji. 

📍Rola bez kwestii mówionych. Do roli nie jest wymagane duże doświadczenie aktorskie. Sceny do odegrania są proste, ale ważne jest, aby dobrze czuć się przed kamerą.

📆**Planowany termin realizacji: dwa dni zdjęciowe - najprawdopodobniej 11 i 12 sierpnia.**

Pola eksploatacji: internet/outdoor (DOOH)

⚠️ Realizacja filmu jest uzależniona od warunków pogodowych dlatego możliwe jest przesunięcie terminu nagrań podanych powyżej. Z tego samego względu preferujemy osoby z Krakowa. 

📩 **Zgłoszenia wraz z aktualnymi zdjęciami (portretowe oraz sylwetki) proszę kierować na adres: marcinkarkosza@grandfox.pl**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - SHORT FILM LIVERPOOL (UNPAID) - NO PRIOR EXPERIENCE NEEDED**

**Location:** L8

**Date:** August 1st (1 day shooting)

**Rate: **Unpaid but expenses covered

Casting **2 male actors in their mid-20s to early 30s** for a quiet, dialogue-led short film following two friends sharing a celebratory smoke after one of them has been promoted.

**Roles:**

**Matt **is dry and sarcastic. He's a working class guy who has managed to work his way up the ladder at his job, and although he is excited for the future, he's conflicted about what he'll have to leave behind.

**Shane **is warm, but quick-witted. He supports his friend, but understands that every step Matt takes forward threatens to leave him behind.

I'm looking for actors interested in naturalistic work and are comfortable letting moments breathe. Chemistry between both roles is vital for this film, so applying together with another actor as a pair will put you at the top of my list for consideration. As this is an unpaid role and my first narrative short, I am happy to consider all applications, even if you have not acted before.

If interested please send your reel, a recent self tape (if you've got one) along with a headshot and some info about yourself (and your partner if you are applying as a pair) to

morningsmokecasting@gmail.com

Thank you, I look forward to hearing from you all!

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Giovanni, and I'm a fashion & portrait photographer from the Netherlands. I'll be visiting **Berlin from July 20th to July 22nd**, and I'm looking to collaborate with a **male model (18+), tall, athletic/muscular build**, for an intimate, editorial-style direct flash photoshoot.

My photography is inspired by 90s fashion campaigns, with a candid, classy, and cinematic aesthetic. This is **not** an explicit shoot, but it is sensual and fashion-oriented.

If you're interested or know someone who might be a great fit, feel free to send me a message!

📍 Berlin, Germany
📅 July 20 to July 22
📸 Instagram: **@giotimoteo**

items.text:
CASTING - PILNE: Tancerze - Panowie, z Warszawy, dobrze zbudowani - casting: potrzebuję jeszcze kilka osób do naszego projektu. Dobrze zbudowanych (umięśnionych i +175 cm) zawodowych tancerzy. Różne style - ale wyłącznie z doświadczeniem na scenie.  Najbliższe zlecenia do obsadzenia: 22.08 Warszawa (w ciągu dnia i próba generalna dzień wcześniej wieczorem)  i 
22.10 pod Warszawą, wieczorem  . 
średnio po 2-3 próby pod dany show. Oba zlecenia to eventy firmowe, w jednym z nich tańczymy taniec grecki (sitraki/zorba) oraz stylizację na Spartan (tu kostium bez koszulki) . Możliwość zostania na dłużej. Zgłoszenia na priv lub mail grupa@tancerze.pl . Chętnych, jeśli się nie znamy, zaproszę na spotkanie, przy metro Kondratowicza, najchętniej w sobotę wieczorem (lub podaj inny termin w ciągu najbliższych dni).

Uwaga, o wyborze tancerzy decyduje klient, dlatego otrzymacie umowę castingową, potrzebuję 4 zdjęcia, wzrost i opis doświdczenia krótki. Podajcie również Waszą stawkę za job. 
Mozna do mnie dzwonić 602 406 111 jeśli macie pytania

Zdjęcie grupy Tancerze PL dla uwagi

items.text:
CASTING CALL! BERLIN
Für unseren Abschlussfilm der @filmuni KONRAD WOLF suchen wir zwei junge Schauspieler, für unsere beiden Hauptrollen, die Brüder Vali & Benno.

Meldet Euch gerne über folgenden Link an: 

http://bit.ly/4oKiapo

Oder schreibt uns eine Mail an: castinglaerm@gmail.com 

Das Alter für Vali liegt zwischen 8 und 11 Jahren, bei Benno zwischen 9 und 13 Jahren.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

#casting

#shortfilm 

#berlin

#lookingforcast

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FILMUNIVERSITĂT BABELSBERG KONRAD WOLF CASTING CALL für unseren 20-minütigen Abschlussfilm LÄRM (AT) suchen wir für unsere Hauptrollen zwei Kinder im Alter von 8 -12 Jahren. Swipe für mehr SwipefürmehrInfos Infos'

May be a graphic of text that says 'FILMUNIVERSITÄT BABELSBERG KONRAD KONRADWOLF WOLF INFOS Drehzeitraum: 14. 09. 2026 -27. 09. 2026 Drehort: Berlin & Brandenburg Produktion: Filmuniuversität Babelsberg KONRAD WOLF Da es sich um eine studentische Produktion handelt, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Kosten für Verpflegung und Anreise werden von uns übernommen. WORUM GEHT'S? Getrennt durch die Einweisung ihrer Mutter in eine psychiatrische Klinik kämpfen eine Mariann und ihre beiden Söhne auf ihre eigene Weise darum, ihre Familie zusammenzuhalten bis sie gemeinsam vor etwas stehen, das gr größer ist, als ihre Angst. Hier entlang zu den Rollenbeschreibungen'

May be an illustration of text that says 'TRĂUMERISCH, QUIRLIG, STUR -hat sich von klein auf immer ganz eigene Lösungen gesucht glaubt aubt fest daran, dass immer einen Weg gibt, seine Ziele zue erreichen leicht uberfodert bei unbeeinflussbaren Situationen -rasende Gedanken sorgen für ungewöhnliche Ideen ansteckende Fantasie und Humor FILMUNIVERSITÄT BABELSBERG KONRAD WOLF Rollentyp: Hauptrolle Spielalter: Spielalter:8-11Jahre 8-11 Jahre Geschlecht: Geschlecht:männlich männlich VALI'

May be an illustration of text that says 'Rollentyp: Rollentyp:Hauptrolle Hauptrolle Spielalter: 9. 9-13 13 Jahre Geschlecht: männlich FILMUNIVERSITÄT BABELSBERG KONRAD WOLF +4 BENNO SELBSTSTĂNDIG. LOYAL, VERNUNFTIG -Pflichtbewusst, funktioniert immer außerhalb der Schule fehlt ihm oft Mut, aus sich herauszukommen um sich -kümmert sich um alle außer selbst -packt zuhause zuverlässig mit an -übernimmt Verantwortung für Vali -hatte immer genug Raum selbst Kind zu sein -jetzt steht er auf der Schwelle zwischen Kinderwelt und Realität, in der er zu schnell erwachsen wird'

May be an image of text that says 'FILMUNIVERSITĂT BABELS BABELSBERG BABELSBERG SBERG KONRAD WOLF KONTAKT Wir freuen uns über Eure Bewerbung mit aktuellem Foto, Geburtsjahr und einem kurzen Vorstellungsvideo. Tragt Euch gerne über folgenden Link in unser Anmelde-Formular Anmelde- -Formulan ein: bit.ly 4oKiapo Bei Fragen Beliaganotsomssee oder Anregungen meldet Euch gerne per Mail unter: castinglaermagmail.com'

Zudem findet auch ab September 2026 der Jahreslehrgang für Pantomime, nonverbalen Ausdruck und Präsenz in Waidhofen an der Thaya, Niederösterreich statt, auf den ich euch aufmerksam machen möchte. items.text:
CASTING NOTICE — PAID SUPPORTING ROLE

I’m looking for an actress to play Mrs. Wallace, Tess’s mother, in my upcoming short film The Gift. It is a small but important supporting role with a brief driveway scene and natural dialogue.

Role: Mrs. Wallace
Playing age: 40–50
Race: White
Shoot date: August 5, 2026
Shoot time: 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM
Shoot location: Denver metro area
Compensation: $100

Required availability:

Online team meeting on July 20
In-person rehearsal near Castle Rock on July 22, approximately three hours in the evening
Filming on August 5 from 5:00 PM to 9:00 PM

A brief audition tape will be required.

Previous work can be found by searching Forrainfilms on YouTube.

To be considered, please email your name, a recent photo, contact information, and any acting materials or relevant experience to sunburstcinema@gmail.com with the subject line “Mrs. Wallace Casting.”

Please send all inquiries via email. No DMs, please.

Thank you!!!

items.text:
Casting Call

"A Bad Person"

LOGLINE: A small-time con artist, already having the worst day of his life, receives a visit from his ex-wife

Production Title: A Bad Person

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Compensation: Paid. 

Audition Information: Virtual/Self Tape

Shooting Schedule:

● Rehearsal  Saturday 8/8

● Shoot Sunday 8/9 & Saturday 8/15 & Sunday 8/16

Shooting Location: Commerce City, CO

Email: andrew@westofcenterfilms.com

Character Breakdowns:

CALVIN MALE (30s-40s)

A small-time scam artist, who has expanded his efforts into a large warehouse full of employees. We meet him on possibly the worst day of his life, where, after finding out his mother has died, he receives an unexpected visit from his ex-wife, whom he very much still loves. The drama takes place between these two characters, as they try to navigate a possible reunion amidst the chaos taking place all around them. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), intensity, and on-screen magnetism. We don’t have to like him, but we do have to care about him.

SUZIE Female (40s-60s)

A well-intentioned–but somewhat hapless–assistant to a small-time con artist, Suzie has the habit of making bad situations into worse ones. Looking for someone with high endurance (will be walking the entire shoot), funny, charming, and a pure scene-stealer.

PA / EXTRA (18+)

A hybrid role consisting of helping out production, while appearing in the background of scenes, with possible dialogue. Experience isn’t the biggest factor, mainly looking for someone with a great attitude and bundles of energy who is keen to learn. The days will be active and long, but extremely fun. 

Please send your resume to andrew@westofcenterfilms.com. Let us know if your avalable on the day of rehearsal and shooting day. Let us know if your SAG and upon request, I'll email you the attached side. Self-tape by Friday, July 17th. Early submissions is awsome.

items.text:
Kick Ass Film Fest is gearing up for a massive Season 7, and we want YOU on our board. We are on a mission to build the future of indie film in our state, and we need your passion to make the 2027 Spring Festival our best yet.
What you’ll be doing: Helping us run epic Fall Meet & Greets (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder), organizing Spring screening premieres, and planning the ultimate Awards Show.
Why join?
    •    Compete anyway: You can still enter the competition!  You won’t be involved in the competition portion of planning the festival.  
    •    Level up with us: This is a volunteer role, but as we grow, there will be opportunities for these to turn into official, expanded positions.
Let’s unite the Colorado film scene. Who’s ready to make some magic? 👇 Drop a 🎥 in the comments if you want to learn more!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScSY-u1zenlnh8lXRaQi3Lr9O93x5Zg4Ca06YChhft1Db2saQ/viewform

sharedPost.text:
Kickass Film Fest is growing, and we’re looking for passionate creatives, film lovers, organizers, and community builders to join our volunteer board.

This volunteer team will help support the events leading up to our 2027 Spring Festival, including:

Fall Meet & Greet networking events (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder)
Spring screening premiere events 
Spring Festival Awards Show Planning
Note: You will not be part of the competition planning, but you can still participate in the competition.

This is a volunteer board, but as KAFF continues to grow, there may be opportunities to grow into official roles or expanded positions on a case-by-case basis.

If you want to help us for Kickass Film Fest Season 7 and help us build the future of independent film in Southern Colorado, we’d love to hear from you!

Apply here: https://forms.gle/SaF2u71YJhbFNXAq9
